items.title_en: CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 18: Legal and Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会“西雅图大讲坛”第18期：人工智能法律和道德问题研究
items.summary_en: Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge at the Shanghai office of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, hosted a CCCWA workshop on legal issues in artificial intelligence.
items.summary_zh: ​日前,美国戴维斯.莱特.特里梅因律师事务所上海代表处主任律师，蔡荣伟主持CCCWA“西雅图大讲坛”...
items.body_en:
Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge at the Shanghai office of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, hosted a CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' workshop, sharing on 'Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence.'

The content included: Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence — Industry/Profession Regulation, Joint Development, Privacy & Security, Potential Legal Liabilities, Bias & Discrimination; and Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence — Unemployment, Inequality, Humanity, Robot Rights, Control.

Mr. Cai focused on the impact of AI development on various industries, analyzed several cases provided by attendees, and addressed their questions and concerns on the spot. The workshop was well received.

Attendees expressed hope that CCCWA would continue to organize workshops on a wide range of specialized topics so the Chinese business community could share knowledge and keep pace with industry trends. CCCWA's efforts in serving the community were highly appreciated and recognized by attendees.
items.body_zh:
日前,美国戴维斯.莱特.特里梅因律师事务所上海代表处主任律师，蔡荣伟主持CCCWA“西雅图大讲坛” 与专业人士分享“人工智能法律和道德问题研究” Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge, Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, Shanghai Office hosted a CCCWA Workshop: "Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence." 内容包含了： Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence:人工智能法律问题研究 Industry/Profession Regulation行业规制 Joint Development联合开发 Privacy & Security隐私和安全 Potential Legal Liabilities潜在法律责任 Bias & Discrimination偏见和歧视 Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence:人工智能道德问题研究 Unemployment 失业 Inequality 不平等 Humanity 人性 Robot rights 机器人权益 Control 控制

针对当下热点人工智能的发展和对各个行业的影响，蔡律师根据与会者提供的实际案例进行了分析，并且当场解答了参会者提出的一些疑问，参会人员受到了启发。 Mr. Cai focused on the impact of AI development on various industries, analyzed several cases provided by attendees, and addressed the concerns and questions. The workshop was well received.

大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座，以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息。同时, 大家肯定了CCCWA对服务社区的努力。 Attendees hope that CCCWA continuously organize workshops in wide range of specialized topics for Chinese business community to share and catch up with the industry trend. CCCWA’s efforts in serving community was highly appreciated and recognized by attendees.

items.title_en: 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador and International Paralympic Committee Image Ambassador Hou Bin's Keynote Speech: Carrying Forward the Olympic Spirit, Overcoming Yourself Through Unwavering Perseverance, and Pursuing Your Dreams to Achieve Success
items.title_zh: 2022年北京冬奥会形象大使、国际残奥委会形象大使侯斌先生主题演讲：弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功
items.summary_en: Recently, three-time World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador Hou Bin attended the CCCWA Seattle Lecture Series, delivering a keynote speech on carrying forward the Olympic spirit and pursuing dreams through perseverance.
items.summary_zh: 近日，世界残奥会三届男子跳高冠军、2022年北京冬奥会形象大使侯斌出席CCCWA西雅图大讲坛，带来“弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功”的主题演讲。...
items.body_en:
Recently, CCCWA's workshop series featured Mr. Hou Bin's public speech on 'Carry Forward the Olympic Spirit, Pursue Dreams and Ambitions.' Mr. Hou is a three-time World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador.

Hou Bin shared the story of his journey: at the age of 9, he lost his left leg in an accident, but the hardship of growing up never dimmed his hopes for the future. At the age of 21, he became a Paralympian, representing China at the 1996 Summer Paralympics in Atlanta and winning the gold medal in high jump with a record of 1.92 meters. He went on to defend his title at both the 2000 and 2004 Paralympic Games. During the opening ceremony of the 2008 Beijing Summer Paralympics, Hou Bin served as the final torchbearer, lighting the Paralympic cauldron by pulling himself up a rope while secured to his wheelchair bracket. Hou Bin said: 'People have to keep striving to surpass themselves — all technology, ideas, the future, and life itself are created, not waited for. We should live with hope and dreams in our hearts. Don't let anyone steal your dream — where there is a dream, there is a future.' (Quoted from a report by The China Press.)

Since retiring, Hou has become a motivational speaker. In 2013, he launched 'Stand Up Again,' a fundraising project for children needing prosthetic limbs after the Ya'an and Wenchuan earthquakes.

Hou Bin's story moved and inspired everyone in attendance. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State hoped that, through this speech, local Chinese community members would come away with something meaningful, while also bringing the community closer together. After the speech, CCCWA presented Hou Bin with the 'CCCWA Social Responsibility Award.'

Hou Bin's story of perseverance was full of positive energy, inspiring everyone in attendance.
items.body_zh:
近日，世界残奥会三届男子跳高冠军、2022年北京冬奥会形象大使侯斌出席CCCWA西雅图大讲坛，带来“弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功”的主题演讲。 Recently, CCCWA workshop series featured Mr. Hou Bin’s public speech on “Carry Forward the Olympic Spirit, Pursue Dreams and Ambitions". Mr. Hou is the three-time winner of the World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympic Games Image Ambassador.

侯斌讲述他的奋足迹：9岁那年的一场意外让侯斌失去了左腿，但成长的艰辛并没有磨灭侯斌对未来的憧憬。1996年，只有21岁的侯斌在亚特兰大残奥会上，以1米92的成绩打破世界纪录，获得男子跳高金牌，此后侯斌在2000年和2004年的两届残奥中卫冕，2008年北京夏季残奥会开幕中，侯斌通过拉拽绳索自行攀爬的方式点燃了残奥会的主火炬。侯斌这样说“人就是要不断去超越，所有的科技、思想、未来、人生都是创造出来而不是等待出来的。我们要活在希望和梦想当中，不要让人偷走你的梦, 有梦想，就有未来。” 引自“侨报”报导 Hou Bing shared his footprint of endeavor: at the age of 9, he lost his left leg due to an accident, however he’d never given up the hope of future despite of the hardship. At the age of 21, he became a Paralympian, and represented China at the 1996 Summer Paralympics in Atlanta and won the gold medal of high jump with the record of 1.92 meters. In 2008, Hou Bin became the first International Paralympic ambassador launched by the International Paralympic Committee. Since then, Hou Bin defended his title at both year 2000 and 2004 Paralympic Games. During the opening ceremony of year 2008 Beijing summer Paralympics' Games, Hou Bin served as Beijing Paralympic Main Torch hand. He lit up the main torch of Paralympic Games by of placing the torch in the wheelchair special bracket and tightening himself to the rope, pulling the rope and climbing up. Hou Bin said: "People have to keep striving and excel. Future and life can be created but waiting. We should live a life with hope and dream in our heart. If there is a dream, there is a future”. The story of Hou Bin’s endeavor is full of aspiration.

自退役以来，侯已成为一名励志演说家，并于2013年推出了“Stand Up Again”，这是一项针对雅安和汶川地震后需要修复截肢的受伤儿童的筹款项目。 Since retirement, Hou has become a motivational speaker. In 2013, he launched "Stand Up Again," a fundraising project for injured children who needed prosthetics after the [Ya'an](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2013_Lushan_earthquake) and [Wenchuan earthquakes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2008_Sichuan_earthquake).

侯斌与大家分享他的故事鼓舞人心, 华盛顿州中国总商会希望通过这次的演讲让本地的华人们能有所收获，同时希望能通过这样的方式凝聚本地的华人社区。演讲结束后，华盛顿州中国总商会给侯斌颁发了“CCCWA社会责任贡献奖”。 The speech was extremely well received and appreciated. Chinese community thanks Mr. Hou’s sharing his story with Chinese community during his family vacation in Seattle. CCCWA hopes the speech will inspire us and through the event to unite the local Chinese community.". After the speech,Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State, presented Hou Bin with the “Excellent Social Responsibility Award”.

侯斌的奋斗故事充满着正能量，激发斗志，大家备受鼓舞。 The story of Hou Bin’s endeavor is full of positive energy, and inspired us to persevere with our goals.

items.title_en: 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit
items.title_zh: 2018年西雅图创新峰会 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit
items.summary_en: The 'Seattle Global Innovation Partnership Summit 2018,' hosted by the City of Seattle, was successfully held last week. Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening day.
items.summary_zh: 西雅图市政府主办的 "2018西雅图全球创新合作伙伴峰会"上周顺利举行。 开幕当日 市长 Durkan 和前州长 Gregoire 出席。 西雅图国际业务发展总监Carlton...
items.body_en:
The 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit was held last week. This event was organized by the World Affairs Council of Seattle. Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening session. Carlton Vann, Seattle's Director of International Business Development, opened the event, and Washington State Lieutenant Governor Habib spoke, highly praising Seattle's development over more than a decade and its future plans.

The Summit presented a strong sense of the Seattle region's strengths in health innovation, global health, information technology, e-commerce, infrastructure development, aerospace, and workforce training.

More than 50 representatives from over 30 countries and regions participated in the summit, from the local Seattle region as well as from San Francisco and Los Angeles. Members from CCCWA and the local community also participated in the event, taking advantage of expanded opportunities for networking.
items.body_zh:
西雅图市政府主办的"2018西雅图全球创新合作伙伴峰会"上周顺利举行。开幕当日市长Durkan和前州长Gregoire出席。西雅图国际业务发展总监Carlton Vann主持开幕，华盛顿州副州长Habib发言高度肯定十几年西雅图的大发展和未来的规划宏图。 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit was held last week. This event was organized by the World Affairs Council of Seattle, Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening session. Carlton Vann, Seattle's director of international business development, opened the event, and Washington State Deputy Governor Habib highly praised of Seattle's development and future plans for more than a decade.

峰会清楚地展示了西雅图地区在医疗创新、全球健康卫生、信息技术、电子商务、基础设施发展、航空航天和劳动力培训方面的优势。 The Summit presented a stronger sense of the Seattle region’s strengths in health innovation, global health, information technology, e-commerce, infrastructure development, aerospace, and workforce training.

来自30多个国家和地区的近50名代表参加了峰会。来自旧金山和洛杉矶企业代表也出席了活动，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会和西雅图本地区的代表也应邀出席，大家在各个环节中扩展了交流互动的机会。 More than 50 representatives from over 30 countries and regions participate in the summit, from the local Seattle region, as well as from San Francisco and Los Angeles. Members from CCCWA and local community also participated the event, took the expanded opportunities for networking.

items.title_en: CCCWA Invites US Professionals to Break Down the '1031 Tax-Deferred Exchange' Every Real Estate Buyer/Seller Should Know
items.title_zh: CCCWA特邀美国专业人士解析房地产买卖过程中须知的“1031税务递延交换”
items.summary_en: When buying or selling property, the '1031 tax-deferred exchange' is a tax strategy the IRS allows taxpayers to use to legally defer taxes.
items.summary_zh: 买卖物业时，“1031 税务递延交换”是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略...
items.body_en:
When buying or selling property, the '1031 tax-deferred exchange' is a tax strategy the IRS allows taxpayers to use to legally defer taxes. '1031' is a tax policy with major implications for investment returns — effectively like borrowing interest-free funds from the government to invest in real estate, a form of leverage.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), together with the Seattle Real Estate Club, recently invited an expert from First American to give a lecture on the 1031 exchange, a powerful real estate tax-saving tool.

Speaker: Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, First American Exchange Company

Topics included:
- What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications?
- Who is considered a qualified intermediary?
- Property identification rules
- How vesting should be held and related party issues
- Reverse and improvement type exchanges
- What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange
- Lesser known exchange alternatives — Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121, and vacation homes — and examples of how to apply them

Attendees enthusiastically participated in this lecture.
items.body_zh:
买卖物业时，“1031 税务递延交换”是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略 ，“1031”是对投资收益有很大影响的一个税务政策，如同借用政府的免息资金去做地产投资，也可说是杠杆原理的一种。 华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA与西雅图地产俱乐部近期邀请First American 专家做一次有关房地产省税利器1031交换条款的讲座: 主讲人：Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, Frist American Exchange Company 内容包括： · What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications? · Who is considered a qualified intermediary? · Property identification rules · How vesting should be held and related party issues · Reverse and improvement type exchanges · What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange · Lesser known exchange alternatives - Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121 and vacation homes; and examples of how to apply them

当日大家踊跃参加了这次讲座。

items.title_en: Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) Members' Latest Benefit:
items.title_zh: 华盛州中国总商会（CCCWA）商会会员的最新福利:
items.summary_en: CCCWA board member company Tuohong US Real Estate Development & Management is celebrating the successful topping-out of its 'The Emerald' waterfront condo project by offering three special-priced purchase slots to CCCWA board members as a thank-you for their support.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会理事会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发管理公司为庆祝其投资管理的“美丽岸”（TheEmerald）海景公寓项目顺利封顶，面向CCCWA...
items.body_en:
CCCWA board member company Tuohong US Real Estate Development & Management is celebrating the successful topping-out of its investment and management project, 'The Emerald' waterfront condominiums, by offering three special-priced purchase slots to CCCWA board members, as a thank-you for their support of CCCWA.

To register: WeChat gloriachatting or email [contact via email]
Project website: https://theemeraldseattle.com/

The Emerald — Project Overview

The Emerald waterfront condominium project is located right in the heart of Seattle, next to the world-famous Pike Place Market — a genuinely premium project in a genuinely scarce location (2nd Ave and Stewart St, Seattle, WA 98101). It's surrounded by major shopping destinations (Macy's, Nordstrom, Westlake, AMC, and Pacific Place), offering a full range of Eastern and Western cuisine nearby. In your free time, the Elliott Bay waterfront is right across the street — a breathtakingly beautiful, up-close connection to nature.

The Emerald was designed and built from start to finish by renowned design firm HEWITT and developer DCWS. The project's design uses a corner layout to maximize the number of units facing the water, with an all-glass exterior — like an emerald set into Seattle's coastline. Seattle's views are stunning from every angle of the building, from the nearby bay to the distant mountains...

The Emerald creates a VIP private retreat where you can find another oasis with family and friends amid the bustle of the city. The 39th-floor sky lounge sits 133.4 meters above Seattle, overlooking the city's waterfront. Its floor-to-ceiling, 7.1-meter glass windows on three sides offer stunning views of Elliott Bay. The fully glass structure fills every corner of the room with sunlight. Designed around quartz stone with complementary gray-toned furniture, the refined, minimalist environment is ideal for relaxing and unwinding, capturing the beauty of Seattle waterfront living through the elements of sky and sea.
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会理事会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发管理公司为庆祝其投资管理的“美丽岸”（TheEmerald）海景公寓项目顺利封顶，面向CCCWA 理事会员提供三套特惠购房指标，回馈大家对CCCWA的支持。 报名方式：微信gloriachatting或邮箱[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) 项目网址：https://theemeraldseattle.com/

美丽岸（The Emerald） 项目概况 美丽岸海景公寓项目就位于西雅图心脏位置，全球闻名派克市场旁边，是名副其实稀缺地段里的优质项目（2nd Ave and Stewart St，Seattle，WA 98101）。各种大型购物中心（Macy’s、Nordstorm、Westlake、AMC和Pacific Place）环伺周围，中西方饕餮美食尽皆品尝。闲暇时，街道对面就是艾略特湾滨海区，零距离接触自然，美到令人窒息。

美丽岸海景公寓项目从设计到完成由著名的设计公司HEWITT和开发商DCWS倾力完成。项目设计采用了转角的设计，尽量使更多单元面向大海，全玻璃外观，犹如西雅图海岸线的一颗祖母绿，任何角度观赏到的西雅图景色都是赏心悦目的，从附近的海湾到远处的山脉……

美丽岸项目打造VIP私人领空，可与家人、朋友寻找喧闹城市里的另一片绿洲。39层的空中会所在西雅图133.4米的高空俯视西雅图城市海滨。三面玻璃的7.1米落地窗享受绝美艾略特湾海景。 全方位玻璃结构，让房间每一处角落铺满阳光。采用以石英石为主题，灰色系家具辅助设计，令人眼前一亮，精致简约的环境可以更好的放松身心、感受着用天空、海水元素诠释的西雅图美丽岸生活。

items.title_en: CCCWA Labor Law Standards Seminar
items.title_zh: CCCWA 劳工法标准条例专题讲座
items.summary_en: Recently, Lani Cao Law Office, the Chief Legal Counsel for the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), invited attorney Mr. John Lee to give a seminar to the community on labor law standards.
items.summary_zh: ​近日， 华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师事务所特邀律师John Lee 为社区作劳工法标准条例专题讲座。 Lani Cao Law Office, the Chief Legal...
items.body_en:
Lani Cao Law Office, the Chief Legal Counsel for the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), recently invited attorney Mr. John Lee to give a seminar to the local community regarding labor and employment law.

Those in attendance were very appreciative of the professional advice shared by Mr. Lee, and expressed hope for more opportunities in the future to host similar seminars with informative special topics from our community's leading professionals.
items.body_zh: 近日， 华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师事务所特邀律师John Lee 为社区作劳工法标准条例专题讲座。 Lani Cao Law Office, the Chief Legal Counsel for the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State(CCCWA), recently invited attorney Mr. John Lee to give a seminar to the local community regarding labor and employment law. 出席讲座的人士们非常感谢律师提供的专业信息，期待今后有机会参与更多社区组织的专题讲座，以便获取最新的专业信息。 Those in attendance were very appreciative of the professional advice shared by Mr. Lee. We hope for more opportunities in the future to host similar seminars with informative special topics from our community's leading professionals.

items.title_en: Choices for High Schoolers Taking College Courses: How Running Start Compares to AP/IB in Selecting Washington State's Top High Schoolers to Advance Directly to College
items.title_zh: 高中生学习大学课程的选择：与AP/IB 相比较，Running Start项目如何选拔华盛顿州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学.
items.summary_en: Recently, CCCWA invited special guest Mr. Lei He, Assistant Director of International Education at Bellevue College, to introduce the community to one option for local high schoolers to take college courses: the Running Start program.
items.summary_zh: 近期， CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会特邀嘉宾Bellevue College 国际教育部主管 Mr Lei He ( Assistant Director of International Education from Bellevue College)...
items.body_en:
Recently, CCCWA invited special guest Mr. Lei He, Assistant Director of International Education at Bellevue College, to introduce the community to one option for local high schoolers to take college courses: the Running Start program.

The Running Start program began in 1990, led by the Washington State government with assistance from the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, with the goal of selecting outstanding Washington State high schoolers to advance directly into college. In the Running Start program, full-time participating students no longer take high school classes, instead using college courses to fulfill the equivalent high school requirements. Second, full-time participants can enter college at age 16 and graduate with a bachelor's degree by age 20, saving 1–2 years of study time. Third, participants in Running Start pay no college tuition, saving 1–2 years of college costs. Fourth, students who complete the program can enter directly as juniors, which carries a relatively higher acceptance rate than applying as a freshman. Over the past 30 years, the Running Start program has continued to grow — at Bellevue College alone, there are now more than 2,500 Running Start students enrolled, mostly from local Eastside high schools, cultivating a large pool of outstanding talent for Washington State.
items.body_zh:
近期， CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会特邀嘉宾Bellevue College 国际教育部主管 Mr Lei He (Assistant Director of International Education from Bellevue College) 为社区介绍本地高中生学习大学课程的选择项目之一：Running Start.

Running Start项目始于1990年，由华盛顿州政府主持、比尔盖茨基金会协助，目的是选拔华州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学. 参加Running Start项目，如果是全日制，学生就不再上高中课程，而是以大学课程抵相应的高中课程；2是全日制参与的学生完全可以做到16岁入大学，20岁本科毕业，节省学生1-2年的学习时间；3是参与Running Start项目，学生无需支付大学学费，节省1-2年大学费用；4是学生完成学习直入大三，比申请大一录取率相对高。30年以来，Running Start项目规模不断扩大，现在仅在贝尔维学院，就有超过2,500名Running Start项目学生就读，主要来自本地东区(East Side)的高中学生，为华州培养了大批优秀人才.

items.title_en: CCCWA Delegation Travels to California for the US-China Agricultural Resources Matchmaking Forum
items.title_zh: CCCWA代表团赴加州参加中美农业资源对接论坛活动
items.summary_en: On November 19, 2019, a CCCWA delegation attended the US-China Agricultural Resources Matchmaking and Food Safety Policy Exchange Forum in Sacramento, jointly hosted by the California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development and the City of Sacramento. The forum aimed to strengthen the exchange of food safety experience and policy between California and China, promote agricultural trade between the two, and build a bridge for cultural exchange.
items.summary_zh: 2019年11月19日，华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在萨克拉门托市参与了由美国加州商务厅、萨克拉门托市政府联合举办的中美农业资源对接及食品安全政策交流论坛。此次论坛旨在加强加州与中国双方食品安全相关经验与政策交流、促进加州与中国农业产品贸易交流、并为加州与中国的人文交流搭建桥梁。...
items.body_en:
On November 19, 2019, a CCCWA delegation attended the US-China Agricultural Resources Matchmaking and Food Safety Policy Exchange Forum in Sacramento, jointly hosted by the California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development (GO-Biz) and the City of Sacramento. The forum aimed to strengthen the exchange of food safety experience and policy between California and China, promote agricultural product trade between California and China, and build a bridge for cultural exchange between the two. Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco attended the forum. The Director of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, a California State Assemblymember, and a Senior Advisor for International Affairs and Trade at GO-Biz introduced California's agricultural development and its agricultural trade with China. Dr. Wang, a food safety policy expert from UC Davis, was invited to present on California's food safety policy and enforcement. The exchange forum also facilitated business matchmaking between major California agricultural producers and Chinese-invested enterprises. After the forum, the delegation was invited to tour local businesses.

Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco and UC Davis food safety policy expert Dr. Wang speaking at the forum

A California State Assemblymember and a Senior Advisor for International Affairs and Trade at GO-Biz speaking at the forum

The CCCWA delegation was invited to tour local businesses

The CCCWA delegation poses for a photo in front of the venue
items.body_zh:
2019年11月19日，华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在萨克拉门托市参与了由美国加州商务厅、萨克拉门托市政府联合举办的中美农业资源对接及食品安全政策交流论坛。此次论坛旨在加强加州与中国双方食品安全相关经验与政策交流、促进加州与中国农业产品贸易交流、并为加州与中国的人文交流搭建桥梁。中国驻旧金山总领馆杨依杭商务参赞参与此次论坛。加州农业厅厅长、加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）国际事务和贸易高级顾问介绍了加州农业发展情况和加州与中国农业贸易情况。加州大学戴维斯分校食品安全政策专家王博士受邀介绍了加州食品安全政策和执行情况。此次交流论坛针对加州主要农产品生产企业与中资企业开展了业务对接活动。论坛结束后代表团受邀赴当地企业进行了实地考察。

中国驻旧金山总领馆杨依杭商务参赞、加州大学戴维斯分校食品安全政策专家王博士在论坛上发言在论坛上发言

加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）国际事务和贸易高级顾问在论坛上发言

CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会代表团受邀到当地企业实地考察

CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在会场门前合影留念

items.title_en: Standing Together Against the Epidemic, United in Overcoming Hardship
items.title_zh: 齐心协力抗疫情，众志成城渡难关
items.summary_en: The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit organization voluntarily founded by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State. The Chamber aims to provide a platform for Chinese-invested enterprises to network in the US, promote trade cooperation between China and the US Pacific Northwest, and support and help more Chinese enterprises invest and grow in the US. CCCWA is also committed to advancing public welfare causes.
items.summary_zh: 华 盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA），是由华盛顿州的中资企业自愿发起组成的非营利性组织。商会旨在为中资企业在美国的交流提供平台，促进中国和美西北地区贸易合作，支持和帮助更多的中资企业对美投资和发展。同时，CCCWA也致力推动社会公益福利事业，过去CCCWA在商会举办的晚宴中特设儿童作品义卖，将所得善款捐赠给美国相关福利机构以资助在美国生活、从小被领养的华裔儿童回到中国寻找亲生父母的活动。...
items.body_en:
The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit organization voluntarily founded by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State. The Chamber aims to provide a platform for Chinese-invested enterprises to network in the US, promote trade cooperation between China and the US Pacific Northwest, and support and help more Chinese enterprises invest and grow in the US. CCCWA is also committed to advancing public welfare causes — in past Chamber galas, children's artwork charity sales raised funds donated to US welfare organizations supporting adopted Chinese-American children in reconnecting with their birth parents in China.

In the face of the sudden outbreak of the novel coronavirus pneumonia epidemic, CCCWA members across many industries have stepped up with corporate social responsibility, actively coordinating with their companies' domestic and overseas branches to procure supplies and donate them free of charge to hard-hit regions in need.

Currently, CCCWA board member companies are mobilizing resources across both China and the US to fight the epidemic: ICBC quickly allocated over RMB 30 million in cash to ensure the smooth operation of transportation, hospitals, and other essential services, and provided approximately RMB 1.6 billion in financing through an expedited approval process for companies involved in epidemic prevention and control. iSoftStone donated RMB 10 million to the city of Wuhan. Systimmune donated medical protective supplies to Sichuan Provincial People's Hospital, West China Second University Hospital of Sichuan University, Wenjiang District People's Hospital in Chengdu, Leshan People's Hospital, Mianyang 404 Hospital, Wuhan Children's Hospital, and Wuhan Asia Heart Hospital. MOMA (Modern Land) has already donated RMB 2 million to Wuhan and established a charitable fund pool of RMB 10 million. Other CCCWA member companies have also provided assistance to compatriots back home through various channels. The virus is merciless, but there is love in this world — let us hold firm and united to defeat this war without gunsmoke.
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA），是由华盛顿州的中资企业自愿发起组成的非营利性组织。商会旨在为中资企业在美国的交流提供平台，促进中国和美西北地区贸易合作，支持和帮助更多的中资企业对美投资和发展。同时，CCCWA也致力推动社会公益福利事业，过去CCCWA在商会举办的晚宴中特设儿童作品义卖，将所得善款捐赠给美国相关福利机构以资助在美国生活、从小被领养的华裔儿童回到中国寻找亲生父母的活动。 面对当下突如其来的新型冠状病毒感染的肺炎疫情，华盛顿州中国总商会会员在各个领域发挥出了企业社会责任感，积极协调公司海内分支机构进行相关物资采购，并无偿捐赠给有需求的疫情严重的地区。

目前CCCWA理事会单位集结中美两国资源奋力抗击疫情：工商银行（ICBC）迅速调拨人民币3000多万元现金，保障交通运输、医院等有序运行，同时通过绿色通道，为疫情防控领域相关企业提供融资约16亿元.软通动力（iSoftStone) 向武汉市捐款人民币1000万元.百利药业 (Systimune)向四川省人民医院、四川大学华西第二医院、成都市温江区人民医院、乐山市人民医院、绵阳404医, 湖北武汉市儿童医院和武汉亚洲心脏病医院捐赠医疗防护物品。当代置业（MOMΛ）已经向武汉捐赠人民币200万元，并设立1000万元慈善基金额度资金池. CCCWA其他单位也已经通过各种渠道方式为国内同胞们提供帮助。 病魔无情，人间有爱，坚定信心对抗疫情，打赢这场没有硝烟的战争。

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Officially Launches COVID-19 Relief Donation Channel
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会抗击新冠捐赠通道正式启动
items.summary_en: As COVID-19 spreads across the globe, confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State have been rising daily. Frontline hospitals such as Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Hospital, Swedish Hospital, and Seattle Children's Hospital have all faced severe shortages of basic protective supplies such as masks and hand sanitizer.
items.summary_zh: ​新冠肺炎蔓延全球，华盛顿州的确诊与死亡人数逐日剧增。一线抗疫医院如Evergreen Hospital、Overlake hospital、Swedish hospital Seattle Children’s...
items.body_en:
As COVID-19 spreads across the globe, confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State have been rising daily. Frontline hospitals such as Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Hospital, Swedish Hospital, and Seattle Children's Hospital have all faced severe shortages of basic protective supplies such as masks and hand sanitizer. To support community public health and address the urgent needs of frontline medical institutions, the CCCWA Foundation urgently formed a donation task force, racing against time to mobilize resources across the community, and issued a call for donations to Chamber member companies, alumni associations, and other organizations to help overcome this challenge together.

On March 20th, the day the donation channel officially launched, the CCCWA Foundation received a donation from member company Systimmune of 2,000 3M N95 masks, 2,000 medical-grade masks, 400 goggles, and 100 sets of protective gowns. That same afternoon, the donations were delivered to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center.

The donation channel is now open. Donors, donated items and quantities, and recipient details will be transparently published on an ongoing basis. Please continue to follow the CCCWA Foundation for details on the donation drive. 'Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community!'

Ways to donate funds:
1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, email: [contact via email]
2. Online wire transfer/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation, Checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024. Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040.

Ways to donate supplies:
Please contact any of the following task force member organizations to coordinate:
1. CCCWA Foundation Task Force: [contact via email]
2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: [contact via email], Phone: 302-358-0366

Text and photos courtesy of: CCCWA Foundation
items.body_zh:
新冠肺炎蔓延全球，华盛顿州的确诊与死亡人数逐日剧增。一线抗疫医院如Evergreen Hospital、Overlake hospital、Swedish hospital Seattle Children’s hospital等都出现了口罩、洗手液等基本防护用品严重紧缺的情况。 为支援社区公共卫生，解一线医疗机构的燃眉之急，华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（CCCWA Foundation）紧急成立捐款工作组，争分夺秒沟通社会各界资源，并向商会会员企业、校友会等机构发出捐赠倡议，共克难关。

3月20日，在捐赠通道正式启动当日，CCCWA Foundation就收到会员单位Systimmune Inc/百利药业捐赠的2000个3M N95口罩、2000个医用级别口罩、400个护目镜以及100套防护服。并已于当日下午前往Everett Providence Hospital以及Overlake medical center进行了捐赠。

捐赠通道已经开启，捐赠者、捐赠物及数量及受赠明细都将陆续透明公布给大家。请持续关注CCCWAFoundation捐赠活动详情. "滴水汇江河，绵力助社区！" 资金捐赠方式： 1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation e-mail: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) 2. 网上电汇/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024 地址:Bank of America , 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA98040。 物资捐赠方式： 请联络以下任一工作组成员机构进一步对接： 1、华盛顿州中国总商会基金会工作小组：[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) 2、厦门大学西雅图校友会：[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)，电话：3023580366

图文来源：华盛顿州中国总商会基金会 CCCWA Foundation

items.title_en: CCCWA Star of the Week — March 26th Event Preview: Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies
items.title_zh: CCCWA 每周一星-3月26日活动预告：中美企业文化的差异与沟通
items.summary_en: As the world's two largest economies, the US and China have increasingly frequent economic and social exchange. Along with this comes growing political and economic friction, such as the trade war. So what should we keep in mind about cross-cultural communication while working, living, starting businesses, and doing business in the US?
items.summary_zh: 中美作为世界上两个最大的经济体，经济社会交往越来越频繁。随之而来，以贸易战为代表的政治经济摩擦也越来越多。那么我们在美国工作、生活以及创业、营商过程中，在跨文化沟通方面有什么需要注意的吗？
items.body_en:
As the world's two largest economies, the US and China have increasingly frequent economic and social exchange. Along with this comes growing political and economic friction, such as the trade war. So what should we keep in mind about cross-cultural communication while working, living, starting businesses, and doing business in the US?

This week's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series is Mr. Yinglin Xia, who brings rich work and entrepreneurial experience from China, Japan, Canada, the US, and other countries around the world, sharing a special presentation on 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies.' Mr. Xia will systematically share his understanding of what makes for good and effective communication within American culture, covering topics such as culture and personality, teamwork, in-person and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports. We hope Mr. Xia's excellent lecture will be helpful for everyone's work and life in the US.

Yinglin Xia: Founder and President of Dilato Infotech Limited. Mr. Xia earned his master's degree in Computer Science from Beijing Jiaotong University in 1987. Before founding his own company, he worked as a software engineer at China's Ministry of Railways, as a software engineer at Tokyo Systems Laboratories in Tokyo, Japan, as a software engineer at DATT Japan in Vancouver, Canada, as a software localization engineer at SimulTrans in Mountain View, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Adobe Systems in San Jose, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Netscape in Mountain View, USA, as a software localization engineer at Microsoft in Redmond, USA, and as Director of Product Globalization Services at hiSoft Technology International Limited in Seattle, USA.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869
items.body_zh:
中美作为世界上两个最大的经济体，经济社会交往越来越频繁。随之而来，以贸易战为代表的政治经济摩擦也越来越多。那么我们在美国工作、生活以及创业、营商过程中，在跨文化沟通方面有什么需要注意的吗？

本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生将从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通。希望夏先生的精彩讲座对大家在美工作和生活带来帮助。

夏映林：Dilato Infotech Limited公司创始人、总裁 夏映林先生于1987年获得北京交通大学计算机科学硕士学位。 创业前，他曾在中国铁道部任软件工程师，在日本东京Tokyo Systems Laboratories任软件工程师，在加拿大温哥华DATT Japan任软件工程师，在美国山景城SimulTrans任软件本地化工程师，在美国圣何塞Adobe Systems任高级本地化工程师，在美国山景城Netscape任高级本地化工程师，在美国雷德蒙德微软任软件本地化工程师，在美国西雅图hiSoft Technology International Limited任产品全球化服务总监。

报名方式 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869

items.title_en: CCCWA Star of the Week — April 3rd Event Preview: How to Do Online Marketing in the US Market
items.title_zh: CCCWA 每周一星4月3日活动预告：美国市场如何进行网络推广
items.summary_en: adSage was founded in 2007 and is known for big-data mining and precision marketing. Headquartered in Beijing, with branch offices in Shanghai, Wuxi, Shenzhen, Seattle, and Los Angeles, adSage is dedicated to providing clients with one-stop integrated 'brand plus performance' digital media marketing services.
items.summary_zh: 艾德思奇科技有限公司（艾德思奇/ adSage ）成立于2007年，以大数据挖掘和精准营销著称。公司总部位于北京，于上海、无锡、深圳、西雅图、洛杉矶等地设有分支机构，致力于为客户提供数字媒体营销领域的“品效合一”一站式整合营销服务。...
items.body_en:
adSage was founded in 2007 and is known for big-data mining and precision marketing. Headquartered in Beijing, with branch offices in Shanghai, Wuxi, Shenzhen, Seattle, and Los Angeles, adSage is dedicated to providing clients with one-stop integrated 'brand plus performance' digital media marketing services. Advertising is information — it serves both brand communication and demand conversion, but every ad must be measurable. Good advertising that resonates with its audience and can be measured requires sustained, cutting-edge technology investment. adSage firmly believes technology can transform marketing, and we continue to invest heavily in R&D toward this important work to better serve our clients. Innovation plus execution: innovation is the foundation and driving force behind any tech company's existence and growth, but innovation must be put into practice, not remain just a concept — execution is the key to making innovation real.

In today's fast-moving tech era, digitizing products and services has become a necessity. Especially with the outbreak of this pandemic, many companies have been forced to work from home, and many traditional retailers have taken a severe hit, being forced to close or even lay off staff, some going bankrupt. How do you reach your audience and buyers across borders during such extraordinary times? This is where digital online marketing shows its power. Today we'll introduce some platforms and ad formats well suited for this.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State invited adSage US Marketing Director Frances Chen to introduce the business value of digital advertising, powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising development in China and the US. Since joining the company in 2017, Frances has used her skills and experience in brand management, partnership building, and performance marketing to help clients such as Blue Nile, Zillow, and TD Ameritrade expand their global market share. Frances manages adSage's media partners at OnlineTimes Corporation, including Tencent, Fatecoupon, TikTok, Baidu, and others. Everyone was welcome to register and attend!

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Friday 8:00–9:15 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:15 PM Beijing Time). Join Zoom Meeting: https://zoom.us/j/292364477 Meeting ID: 292 364 477
items.body_zh:
艾德思奇科技有限公司（艾德思奇/adSage）成立于2007年，以大数据挖掘和精准营销著称。公司总部位于北京，于上海、无锡、深圳、西雅图、洛杉矶等地设有分支机构，致力于为客户提供数字媒体营销领域的“品效合一”一站式整合营销服务。 广告就是信息，兼具品牌传播和需求转化的作用，但任何广告都是可衡量的。贴合受众兴趣的好广告和能够衡量的广告，都需要持续并且尖端的科技投入。adSage坚信科技可以改变营销，我们为持续的为这一伟大的工作投入大量研发精力来为客户更好的服务。 创新力+执行力：创新是科技公司存在的根本和发展的动力，但创新必须付诸实践，而不仅是概念，因此执行力是保障创新被实现的关键要素。

在高速发展的科技时代，把产品以及服务电子化已成为一个必要的过程。尤其是在这次疫情爆发的前提下，很多公司被迫在家办公，很多传统零售业受到重创，不得不关门乃至裁员，有一些甚至破产。如何在特殊时期跨低于跨国界联系到你的受众群以及买家？这就是数字化网络营销发挥神奇力量的地方。今天我们就来介绍一下一些比较适合大家的投放平台以及广告投放形式。

华盛顿州中国总商会邀请adSage美国营销总监Frances Chen向大家介绍网络营销借助通信和数字媒体技术推动的数字广告的商业价值,中美两地数字广告的发展现状及展望。 自2017年加入公司以来，Frances凭借其在品牌管理，建立伙伴关系和绩效营销方面的技能和经验，已帮助Blue Nile，Zillow，TDAmeritrade等众多客户扩大了全球市场份额。 Frances管理adSage的媒体合作伙伴| OnlineTimes Corporation，包括腾讯，北美省钱快报，Tiktok，百度等。欢迎大家报名参加！

报名方式: 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： 美西时间周五晚间8PM-9:15PM (北京时间周六上午11AM-12:15PM) Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/292364477 Meeting ID: 292 364 477

items.title_en: CCCWA Call for Donations: Love Lunches for Frontline COVID-19 Workers
items.title_zh: CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐倡议书
items.summary_en: This drive is led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito. The Dolar Shop, together with Asian Family Market, has pledged $120,000 in value; The Dolar Shop has separately pledged an additional $84,000; IJ Sushi Burrito has pledged $108,000; and Chowbus Inc. (professional delivery services) has pledged $30,000.
items.summary_zh: 此活动由豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）和IJ Sushi Burrito 日餐厅领捐 ：1，豆捞坊联合百佳超市认捐价值12万美金, ...
items.body_en:
This drive is led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito. The Dolar Shop, together with Asian Family Market, has pledged $120,000 in value; The Dolar Shop has separately pledged an additional $84,000; IJ Sushi Burrito has pledged $108,000; and Chowbus Inc. professional delivery services has pledged $30,000. Recipient organizations already confirmed include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital.

The drive plans to raise $400,000 within a month and prepare 30,000 love lunches, delivering them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. Even before this call for donations was formally published, Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Office and Ms. Sylvia Chin had already done substantial early groundwork — CCCWA has already received over $10,000 in cash donations from Ruoyao Li and Shuo Zhang of Jing Wei LLC and other companies and individuals, and The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito have already provided a full week of free love lunches to the community, to an enthusiastic response.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time.

Though separated by mountains and rivers, we share the same moon and sky. We love our homeland thousands of miles away, and we love the land beneath our feet. Fellow Washingtonians — let's cheer on our second hometown; this is where we live and work, and where our children grow up healthy and happy. Now, we need to stand together with people of all backgrounds in America and fight this epidemic together. We will do our utmost to give back to our community, and to express Chinese Americans' love for and devotion to our second home. May heaven show mercy and grant peace; may the world be well and humanity live in harmony. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

Supporting organizations: The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Asian Family Market, Chowbus Inc., Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Cai & Cai Associates, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404)

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
此活动由豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐：1，豆捞坊联合百佳超市认捐价值12万美金, 2，豆捞坊独自额外认捐价值8.4万美金3，IJ Sushi Burrito认捐价值10.8万美金。4, Chowbus Inc 专业配送服务认捐价值3万美金。目前已联系好的的受赠单位包括：UW Virology 华大病毒实验室、Swedish Hospital 瑞士医院、Overlake Hospital 欧弗莱克医院、Evergreen Hospital 长青医院。 此活动计划在一个月内募集40万美元，制作3万份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。可喜的是，在倡议书尚未发出之际，蔡和蔡律师事务所的蔡清律师和Sylvia Chin女士在活动初期做了大量的工作，华盛顿总商会已收到美国经纬有限公司李若垚、张硕夫妇及其他企业个人捐赠的超过1万美金现金，豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito已为社会各界提供了一周的免费爱心午餐，反响热烈。

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 山川异域，风月同天。我们爱万里之遥的祖国，也爱脚下的这片土地。华州的父老乡亲们，让我们为第二故乡加油，这里是我们工作生活的家园，这里是我们的孩子健康成长的乐土。现在，我们需要和美国的各族裔站在一起，齐心协力、共同抵抗疫情。我们尽最大的努力，回馈社区，表达我们美国华人对第二故乡的爱和奉献。愿天降怜爱，赐予太平；愿世界安好，人类祥和。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！

本次活动主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP（[email protected]） IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[email protected]） 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) Chowbus Inc. 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） SC Intl Realty （2062289404）

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: CCCWA's First 'Star of the Week' Livestream Launches! Mr. Yinglin Xia Shares 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies'
items.title_zh: 首期CCCWA“每周一星“热线开播！夏映林先生为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》
items.summary_en: CCCWA's weekly video series officially launched on March 23rd, with member companies and enterprise representatives from home and abroad sharing professional knowledge and introducing their company's products and services through an online platform.
items.summary_zh: ​CCCWA 每周视频分享于3月23日正式开播了，会员单位和海内外的企业代表通过网络平台 分享专业知识 、介绍公司产品与服务。
items.body_en:
CCCWA's weekly video series officially launched on March 23rd, with member companies and enterprise representatives from home and abroad sharing professional knowledge and introducing their company's products and services through an online platform.

The guest for the first episode of CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Mr. Yinglin Xia, who brings rich work and entrepreneurial experience from China, Japan, Canada, the US, and other countries, sharing a special presentation on 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies.' Mr. Xia systematically shared his understanding of what makes for good and effective communication within American culture, covering culture and personality, teamwork, in-person and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports, and answered practical questions about US-China cultural and communication issues encountered in business cooperation.

Drawing on his rich work experience and real case studies, Mr. Xia promptly answered attendees' questions, and the nearly 40 online participants came away with insights on multiple fronts. Everyone hopes CCCWA will continue to host similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals. CCCWA hopes to get to know more of its members and provide a platform for exchange, sharing, and cooperation — a win-win for everyone in 2020!
items.body_zh:
CCCWA 每周视频分享于3月23日正式开播了，会员单位和海内外的企业代表通过网络平台分享专业知识、介绍公司产品与服务。

第一期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通，并解答有关中美文化与沟通、商业合作中遇到的实际问题 。

专业人士结合丰富的工作经历和实际案例的分享，及时解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 近40位在线参会人员受到多方面的启发。 大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。CCCWA 希望能了解更多会员，为大家提供交流、分享、合作的平台、共赢2020年！

To all CCCWA members: no matter which corner of the world you're in, let's connect more often while staying home. Each week, one member company will share professional knowledge and introduce their company's products and services via a Zoom video session. We hope 2020 brings us closer to more of our members, with exchange, sharing, cooperation, and mutual success!

For friends planning to invest or start a business in Seattle: CCCWA's expert advisory panel will draw on their firsthand experience to answer your questions about US-China culture and communication, business cooperation, real estate and investment, law, taxes, and more. Every Friday, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). See you there!

items.title_en: Love Lunch Story Feature — Chowbus: A Messenger of Love Shuttling Between Restaurants, Hospitals, and Police Stations Every Day
items.title_zh: 爱心午餐报道之--Chowbus: 每天穿梭在餐厅和医院、警察局之间的爱的使者
items.summary_en: When the Love Lunch drive first launched, Chowbus was one of the first to join, and Chowbus manager Michelle also took on the role of delivery team lead. Michelle said: 'What moved me to join was entirely the generosity shown by the restaurants — I wanted to use my own resources and strengths to help achieve this goal alongside everyone else.'
items.summary_zh: 在爱心午餐活动刚刚发起时，Chowbus就第一时间加入进来，Chowbus 负责人Michelle也担任了本次爱心午餐配送组组长的工作。Michelle说：“能参加这个活动完全是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。在几乎所有的人都安全在家时，此时医务工作者、警察这些人却需要坚守岗位，希望能给奋战在一线岗位的工作者一些关怀，让他们能在守护我们的同时感到一些温暖和陪伴。”...
items.body_en:
When the Love Lunch drive first launched, Chowbus was one of the first to join, and Chowbus manager Michelle also took on the role of delivery team lead. Michelle said: 'What moved me to join was entirely the generosity shown by the restaurants — I wanted to use my own resources and strengths to help achieve this goal alongside everyone else. While almost everyone else is safe at home, medical workers and police officers still need to stay on duty. I hope we can bring a little care to those working on the front lines, so they feel some warmth and companionship even as they protect us.'

'If the restaurants donating to the Love Lunch drive are the needle, then Chowbus's delivery is the thread — Chowbus wove the whole operation together seamlessly, creating the touching picture behind this donation effort.' That's how the Love Lunch organizing committee described Chowbus's role in this drive. In this relay of love lunches, Chowbus connects a dozen or so participating restaurants on one end, and a dozen frontline hospitals, the Bellevue Police Department, and mobile testing sites on the other — becoming the most critical bridge in the whole effort. As of now, Chowbus has delivered more than 5,000 love lunches to frontline medical staff and police, and will continue donating its professional delivery services over the coming month or more.

Connecting restaurants and frontline workers through delivery. Chowbus staff put in real sweat for this cause, and the company gave up its own profit to do good. Ironically, the pandemic caused Chowbus's own business to grow rapidly in the short term. While still ensuring high-quality service for its regular customers, Chowbus not only hired more drivers but also mobilized office staff to help with the Love Lunch drive whenever needed, completing the work reliably and on time. Every day, Chowbus completes hundreds of love-lunch deliveries. Each of those hundreds of meals requires Chowbus staff to first pick up food from each restaurant, then deliver it to different hospitals, police stations, and mobile testing sites. Recipient organizations are spread far apart — some hospitals require a round trip of over 100 miles, and a single delivery task, from pickup to drop-off, can take at least three hours. Yet Chowbus's delivery staff never complained, cheerfully accepting however much food and however far the distance. When some hospitals had strict requirements for delivery timing and food temperature, they still managed to deliver food meeting those standards within the required window. When restaurants needed help, Chowbus staff would put on protective gear and help pack and load food, carrying steaming hot meal boxes to their destinations. Michelle also thanked the restaurants working alongside them — The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou, and others — saying it was their seamless coordination that made timely delivery of the love lunches possible.

Connecting users and the Love Lunch drive through its platform. On one hand, Chowbus connects restaurants and frontline workers through delivery; on the other, it connects everyday users to the Love Lunch drive through its own platform. After many people saw news coverage of the 'Love Lunch' drive, they expressed interest in donating too. So Chowbus opened a donation channel on its website and app, letting users choose to donate a love meal to police and frontline command hotlines, to ICU/ER frontline medical staff, to mobile testing stations, or other amounts. The donation feature received an enthusiastic response the day it launched, with one anonymous user donating dozens of love lunches in one go. The platform also received over $3,000 in donations from users, with Michelle herself leading by donating $500 — all funds were passed along to the event's finance team to purchase more love lunches for frontline workers.

Every time medical staff or police officers receive a love lunch from a Chowbus driver, their faces light up with genuine happiness. They say receiving these 'love lunches' warms their hearts and gives them extra motivation in the fight against the pandemic. Just last week, when Bellevue police officers enjoyed their first love lunch, they happily posted on Facebook to thank Chowbus and the restaurants! In the days ahead, Chowbus's eye-catching red insulated delivery bags will continue showing up frequently at police stations, hospitals, and testing sites, bringing a love lunch to the frontline workers protecting our Seattle home!

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Asian Family Market, Chowbus Inc., Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Cai & Cai Associates, SC Intl Realty

Fundraising Team Lead: Jiyuan Na, email: [contact via email]
items.body_zh:
在爱心午餐活动刚刚发起时，Chowbus就第一时间加入进来，Chowbus 负责人Michelle也担任了本次爱心午餐配送组组长的工作。Michelle说：“能参加这个活动完全是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。在几乎所有的人都安全在家时，此时医务工作者、警察这些人却需要坚守岗位，希望能给奋战在一线岗位的工作者一些关怀，让他们能在守护我们的同时感到一些温暖和陪伴。” “如果说参加捐赠的餐厅是爱心午餐活动的‘针’，那么Chowbus的配送就是这次活动的‘线’，经过Chowbus穿针引线，将整个活动组织得有条不紊，构成这次爱心午餐捐赠的动人画面。”这是爱心午餐活动组委会对Chowbus在这次活动中作用的评价。在这场爱心午餐的接力赛中，Chowubus一端连接制作爱心午餐的十几家餐厅，一端连接着UW Virology、Bellevue Police等十几个一线医护、警察局以及移动防疫站，成为这场爱心午餐活动中最重要的桥梁。截止目前为止，Chowbus已经向一线医护、警察局等机构共计配送了5000多份爱心午餐，在接下来的一个多月时间中，还将继续用专业配送为受助机构奉献爱心。

用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者 为了爱心午餐，Chowbus工作人员付出了辛勤汗水，而Chowbus公司更是舍弃自己盈利去做公益。据了解，疫情的发生让Chowbus自身业务短期内迅速增长。在保证提供给自己用户高质量服务的前提下，Chowbus不但增加雇佣司机、更是出动办公室工作人员，随时援助爱心午餐活动，保质保量完成任务。 每天，Chowbus都要完成几百份爱心午餐的配送任务。这数百份的爱心餐都需要Chowbus工作人员先分别去各个餐厅取餐，然后送往不同的医院、警察局、移动检测点。受捐机构都分布很分散，远些的医院去一趟往返路程加起来得一百多英里，一单任务从取餐到送餐完成的时间加起来至少花费三个小时。但是，Chowbu配送人员毫无怨言，再多的餐、再远的路他们都欣然接受。当有的医院对送餐时间、餐品温度有着严格的要求时，他们也能在规定时间将符合温度标准的食物送到。当爱心午餐餐厅需要帮忙时，Chowbus的员工就会带上防护品，帮助餐厅打包、装车，带着热气腾腾的饭盒前往目的地。在此，Michelle 也向共同奋战的豆捞坊、IJ Sushi、颐和园海鲜酒楼、蓉城老火锅、沸腾鱼乡、刘一手等餐厅表示感谢，她说，正是因为大家的默契配合，才能让爱心餐及时送达。

用平台连接用户和爱心午餐 一方面，Chowbus用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者；另一方面，Chowbus用自己的网络平台连接大众用户和爱心午餐。 当很多人看到“爱心午餐”的活动报道后，都纷纷表示自己也想捐助爱心午餐。为此，Chowbus在网站和APP上也开通捐赠通道，用户可以选择捐一顿爱心餐给警察以及前线指挥热线、给ICU、ER的一线医护人员、捐给移动监测站、以及其他金额捐赠。捐赠爱心餐功能上线当天就收到用户们认可并纷纷解囊，甚至有位匿名用户一口气捐了几十份爱心午餐。平台上还收到用户们的3000多美金爱心捐款，Michelle本人也带头捐赠500美金，这些捐款都一并转给活动财务组，用来给一线工作人员们购买更多爱心餐。 每当医护人员、警察从Chowbus司机手中接过爱心餐时，脸上都洋溢着灿烂幸福的笑容，他们说，能收到这些“爱心午餐”内心很温暖，这给他们抗疫工作增添了更大的动力。就在上周，当Bellevue 警察局的警察们首次享用到爱心午餐时，开心地在Facebook发文感谢Chowbus、感谢餐厅！ 在接下来的日子，Chowbus醒目的红色配送保温包还将频繁出现在警察局、医院和监测点，为保卫西雅图家园的一线工作者们送上一份爱心午餐！

主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State 本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 The Dolar Shop IJ SUSHI BURRITO 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) Chowbus Inc. 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） SC Intl Realty
