items.title_en: Fighting COVID-19: Love Restaurant Series Feature — 'The Dolar Shop': One Pot, One World — Yesterday Others Carried Me Across, Today I Carry Others
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐厅系列介绍之“豆捞坊”：一锅一世界-昨日人渡我，今日我渡人
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), led by The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community.
items.summary_zh: 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心午餐募捐活动”...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) and led by The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community. As of the evening of April 2nd, beyond The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, four more restaurants — Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou — have joined the drive, pledging to donate 14,150 lunches, with 1,515 love lunches already prepared and delivered to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need.

When asked why they took the initiative to launch the 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch' donation drive, the manager of The Dolar Shop's Seattle location gave a simple answer: 'One pot, one world — yesterday others carried me across, today I carry others across.' As I understand it, he meant that since opening in Seattle in October 2018, the restaurant's growth has been sustained by the community's support. Now, amid America's severe COVID-19 outbreak, with restaurants forced to close, The Dolar Shop still wanted to give back to the local community for its year and a half of support. So The Dolar Shop decided to offer free love lunches to anyone in the community who needed one. All of The Dolar Shop's staff put this gratitude — 'yesterday others carried me, today I carry others' — into real action.

Food is the foundation of the people's livelihood — as the pandemic forced many restaurants to close, police officers, community workers, medical staff, taxi drivers, people working and studying from home, and unattended elderly people all faced difficulties getting meals. At first, The Dolar Shop Seattle voluntarily donated love lunches, available for free pickup by anyone who needed one. Perhaps because word didn't spread far enough, or people didn't believe such generosity was real, not many people came to claim a free lunch. Later, once CCCWA learned of this, it proactively reached out to other nonprofit organizations across greater Seattle, connecting with hospital systems and more restaurants, to deliver love lunches to medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response, benefiting many more people in need.

As the Buddha said: a world in a flower, a lifetime in a tree, a heaven in a blade of grass, the Buddha in a leaf, paradise in a grain of sand, a pure land in every place, a lifetime's bond in a smile, tranquility in a single thought. The Dolar Shop has its own version of this philosophy: one pot, one world. Each person gets their own pot — cleaner and more hygienic — and everyone can choose their own flavors and ingredients, while still gathering around one table, enjoying good food and lively conversation together. People have even waited in line for two hours just to enjoy their favorite Dolar Shop hot pot.

What's the story behind The Dolar Shop brand? According to the restaurant's management, the concept of 'dolar' (Chinese: 豆捞) hot pot originated in Macau. In the past, when people couldn't afford premium ingredients, they turned seafood into thin, silky slices — delicious and affordable, and much loved by the people of Macau. 'Dolar' is also a homophone in Chinese for prosperity and abundance, making it an auspicious name as well. Later, Macau-style dolar hot pot spread to mainland China, becoming synonymous with high-end, luxury hot pot and a popular choice for business banquets.

With so many hot pot brands out there, what makes The Dolar Shop distinctive? According to management, hot pot broadly falls into two categories: Sichuan spicy hot pot and Hong Kong-style seafood hot pot. Dolar hot pot belongs to the Hong Kong style, using the freshest seafood sliced thin, paired with the highest-quality beef and a secret house sauce, finished off with a nourishing hot pot soup to drink. The Dolar Shop is a premium hot pot brand, using only the best ingredients available — because good ingredients make for good flavor. The Dolar Shop's decor is also cutting-edge, and its service is top-notch, always putting guests first. The Dolar Shop even pays close attention to details guests never see, in the kitchen — even the copper pipes under the sink are required to be polished to a shine. It's precisely because of this relentless commitment to consistent quality that, since founding the brand in Shanghai in 2004, The Dolar Shop has opened 52 company-owned locations worldwide, including four overseas — in Seattle, New York, Vancouver, and Sydney.

Our heartfelt thanks to the entire team at The Dolar Shop for proactively giving back to society and helping the community even during this most difficult time for the restaurant industry amid the pandemic. We wholeheartedly wish The Dolar Shop a century-long legacy as a world-renowned brand! Blessings to The Dolar Shop!

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心午餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮届的热烈响应。至4月2日晚，除了豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐 厅，又有颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等4家餐厅新加入到捐赠爱心午餐的队伍中来，承诺捐 赠午餐14,150份，并已制作完成1,515份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。 当被问到为什么主动发起“抗击新冠疫情爱心午餐”捐赠活动的初心时，豆捞坊⻄雅图分店负责人回答非常 简洁:“一锅一世界:昨日人渡我，今日我渡人。” 我理解他的意思是，自2018年10月进入⻄雅图以来，人 们的喜爱支撑了企业的发展。当今正直美国新冠疫情严重，饭店被迫关店歇业之时，豆捞坊仍然希望能为 当地社区做些什么，以回馈社区一年半以来的厚爱。所以，豆捞坊决定向社区所有需要的人免费提供爱心 午餐。豆捞坊全体员工以实际行动表达“昨日人渡我，今日我渡人”的感恩。 ⺠以⻝为天，疫情隔离之下，很多饭店关⻔，导致警察、社区工作人员、医护人员、出租⻋司机、居家工 作和学习的人们、无人照料的老人都遇到了吃饭问题。最初豆捞坊⻄雅图店自愿捐献爱心午餐，任何需要 的人都可以到店里领取一份免费爱心午餐。可能是因为传播有限，或者人们并不相信有这样的好事，来主 动领取爱心午餐的人并不多。后来华盛顿州中国总商会了解到这个情况，主动联系大⻄雅图地区其他公益 组织联系医院系统以及更多的饭店，为冲在抗疫救灾第一线的医护人员送上爱心午餐，让更多需要的人受 益。

佛曰:一花一世界，一木一浮生，一草一天堂，一叶一如来，一砂一极乐，一方一净土，一笑一尘缘，一 念一清静。豆捞坊也提出了自己的理念:一锅一世界。每人一锅，更干净卫生，每个人都可以选择自己的 口味和菜品，大家又都聚在一个餐桌上，一边品味美⻝，一边谈笑⻛生。人们甚至常常要排2小时的队才能吃到心爱的豆捞火锅。 豆捞坊品牌背后有什么样的故事呢?据豆捞坊负责人介绍豆捞的概念来自澳⻔，以前人们吃不起好的⻝ 材，就把海鲜做成滑类，这样既美味又便宜实惠，很受澳⻔人⺠的喜爱。而且豆捞的谐音是“都捞”，寓意 吉祥富贵，也能讨个好口彩。后来，澳⻔豆捞传到大陆，成了奢侈高端火锅的代名词，商务宴请的重要选择。 火锅品牌众多，豆捞坊有什么自己的特色呢?豆捞坊负责人介绍，火锅大致可以分为两类，四川麻辣火锅 和港式海鲜火锅。豆捞就属于港式火锅，用最新鲜的海鲜做成滑类，选择最高品质的牛肉，配以秘制酱 料，吃完还可以喝滋补的火锅靓汤。豆捞坊是高端火锅，选用的都是能 找到的最好的⻝材，⻝材好，味道才能更好。豆捞坊的装修也是最超前的，服务也是最好的， 永远把客人放在第一位。豆捞坊还很注意在客人看不到的后厨下功夫，连 下水道的铜管都要求擦得铮明瓦亮。正因为豆捞坊对品质一致性的高要 求，自2004年在上海创立品牌至今，豆捞坊在全世界开了52家分店都是直营，其中海外有四家店，分别在 ⻄雅图、纽约、温哥华和悉尼。 衷心感谢豆捞坊全体同仁在疫情之下餐饮业最艰难的时刻，仍然主动回馈社会，帮助社区。衷心祝愿豆捞 坊成为百年老店，世界品牌!祝福豆捞!

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: Join Us to Hear the Story Behind the Love Lunch Drive — Invitation to the 'Love Lunch' Press Conference
items.title_zh: 邀请您聆听爱心活动背后的故事——“爱心午餐”新闻发布会诚邀您的参加
items.summary_en: As April began, a 'CCCWA Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Call' spread across Seattle's Chinese community social circles, with everyone eagerly sharing it, praising both the organizers' generosity and this creative way of showing love. As of April 11th, six lead-donor restaurants had pledged a combined $242,000 in value, and $27,000 had been raised from the broader community.
items.summary_zh: ​四月刚刚开始拉开序幕，一则“CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐倡议书”传遍了西雅图华人的朋友圈，大家竞相转发，不但为活动主办方的爱心点赞，更是为这个独出心裁的献爱心方式叫好。该活动由华盛顿州中国总商会（简称：CCCWA）发起倡议、西雅图本地餐厅与外送平台Chowbus参与领捐，并由社会各界热情支持。活动计划在一个月内募集价值40万美元的爱心午餐送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手中。截止4月11日，6家主捐餐厅承诺将共同捐赠总价值$24.2万美金的套餐，募集到社会各界捐款2.7万美元。
items.body_en:
As April began, a 'CCCWA Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Call' spread across Seattle's Chinese community social circles, with everyone eagerly sharing it, praising both the organizers' generosity and this creative way of showing love. The drive was initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), with local Seattle restaurants and delivery platform Chowbus leading the donations, and enthusiastic support from across the community. The drive plans to raise $400,000 worth of love lunches within a month, delivering them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. As of April 11th, six lead-donor restaurants had pledged a combined $242,000 worth of meal packages, and $27,000 had been raised from the broader community.

After donating masks, protective gowns, and other medical supplies to hospitals, why did the group also choose to participate in pandemic relief through 'love lunches'? Organizer CCCWA hoped to use its own strengths and unique resources to support medical workers. 'Right now, every member of our community is doing their part to support frontline medical workers and cheer on our city. CCCWA, as a nonprofit made up of Chinese-invested businesses in Washington State, includes many outstanding, big-hearted restaurant entrepreneurs. When they learned the pandemic had made medical staff's work even busier and more stressful, making sure frontline workers could enjoy a good lunch became something they genuinely wanted to do. Even though the pandemic has hit their businesses hard, they still wanted to give generously to support frontline medical staff and contribute something to the city they love. So we connected with restaurant resources and partnered with delivery platform Chowbus to organize this Love Lunch drive. We hope to rally support from across the community, raise more funds, and amplify their generosity together.' CCCWA President Lily Lyu explained the origins of the drive.

The 'Love Lunch' drive has received strong support from local Seattle restaurants and delivery platforms. Participating restaurants are all well-known names in the Seattle area: The Dolar Shop (together with Asian Family Market), IJ Sushi Burrito, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Imperial Garden Beijing Duck Restaurant, and Chengdu Memory. Even though the pandemic-driven shutdown hit the restaurant industry's revenue hard, these restaurant owners 'worried about the world before worrying about themselves' — rather than prioritizing their own profits, they gave selflessly and actively took part in preparing free lunches. For delivery, Chowbus, with its professional delivery service, proactively took on the task of delivering for this drive. Even though the pandemic period is Chowbus's busiest time for its own business, Chowbus still assigned dedicated staff to coordinate scheduling and delivery for this drive, delivering love lunches to medical staff on time every day.

Over the two weeks since the drive began, nonprofits including the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Sunshine Youth Foundation, and the Guangfu Association have all provided strong support and assistance — especially Attorney Cai Qing and Ms. Sylvia Chin of Cai & Cai Law Office, Ruoyao Li and Shuo Zhang of Jing Wei LLC, and UW student Rhea, who not only led the way with early donations but also devoted significant time to advancing the project. A working group of over thirty volunteers has served this drive, drawn from various nonprofits, donor organizations, the community, government, universities, and high schools.

As of April 11th, 3,845 love lunches had been delivered, and 675 medical workers at 15 key frontline hospitals — including UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital — have already enjoyed these love lunches. The delivery scope will continue to expand, reaching more medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. Medical workers have expressed heartfelt thanks for this drive. Many, upon receiving their love lunches, were deeply moved and shared their love lunches on social media, thanking the drive in their own unique ways and tagging the participating restaurants to help promote them.

April is usually the most beautiful time of year, but everyone involved in the 'Love Lunch' drive has had no time to enjoy the spring scenery — they've been busier than ever, giving their all to the fight against the pandemic. To help everyone gain a fuller understanding of the Love Lunch plan, hear from the restaurants about why they got involved, and learn how delivery platform Chowbus managed to connect restaurants and hospitals so effectively, CCCWA will hold an online press conference on April 13th, 2:00–3:30 PM Seattle time. At that time, restaurant owners, partner organization leads, and working group members will share the story behind this 'Love Lunch' drive. If you are a Chinese-language media outlet, independent media creator, or an interested partner organization or individual in Seattle, you are warmly invited to join this online session.

Press conference details:
Time: April 13th, 2:00–3:30 PM
Zoom livestream link: https://washington.zoom.us/j/766492115

Agenda: CCCWA President Lily Lyu gives an overview of the drive; Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee gives remarks; Attorney Cai Qing introduces the legal aspects of the project; Outreach Team Lead Sylvia gives an update on recipient hospitals; Delivery Team Lead Michelle gives an update on delivery; Finance Team Lead Xiaoyan Li gives an update on donated supplies and funds; Communications Team Lead Grace speaks, followed by English-language media lead Rhea; representatives from three lead-donor restaurants speak (The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, Imperial Garden); partner organizations give remarks; Fundraising Team Lead Jiyuan Na speaks; Q&A session.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp
items.body_zh:
四月刚刚开始拉开序幕，一则“CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐倡议书”传遍了西雅图华人的朋友圈，大家竞相转发，不但为活动主办方的爱心点赞，更是为这个独出心裁的献爱心方式叫好。该活动由华盛顿州中国总商会（简称：CCCWA）发起倡议、西雅图本地餐厅与外送平台Chowbus参与领捐，并由社会各界热情支持。活动计划在一个月内募集价值40万美元的爱心午餐送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手中。截止4月11日，6家主捐餐厅承诺将共同捐赠总价值$24.2万美金的套餐，募集到社会各界捐款2.7万美元。

在向医疗机构捐赠口罩、防护服等医疗物资之后，为何又以“爱心午餐”形式参与到援助抗疫中？活动主办方CCCWA希望，发挥协会自身优势，用自己独特的方式和资源去支援医护人员。“现在社区的每一份子都用各自方式为抗疫前线的医护人员服务，为我们的城市加油。而CCCWA作为由华盛顿州中资企业自发组成的非营利性组织，拥有一批优秀而有爱的餐饮企业家，他们得知疫情让医护人员工作节奏更忙碌紧张，能让一线医护人员及时吃到可口的午餐成为他们的一个愿望，虽然疫情使他们的生意备受冲击，他们仍希望慷慨解囊，为一线医护人员助力，为自己热爱的城市做一点自己的贡献。于是我们对接餐厅资源，并联合外送平台Chowbus，一起组织了这次爱心午餐活动。我们希望联合社会各界力量，募集更多的资金，共同把他们的爱心放大。”CCCWA会长吕莉莉介绍本次活动发起缘由。

“爱心午餐”得到西雅图当地餐厅和外送平台的大力支持。参与活动的餐厅都是西雅图地区耳熟能详的知名餐厅：豆捞坊中餐厅（联手百家超市）、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、刘一手火锅、沸腾鱼乡、颐和园海北京烤鸭店、蓉城老火锅。由于受疫情影响，餐饮业暂停让餐饮业绩受到巨大冲击，但是这些餐馆负责人“不忧己而忧天下”，不但没把自身营利放在首位，反而无私奉献积极参与制作免费午餐。在配送上，拥有专业配送服务的Chowbus外卖平台主动承担起本次爱心活动的配送。尽管疫情期间正是Chowbus业务最为繁忙阶段，但是Chowbus依然配备了专门人员对接本次活动负责沟通排期与外送，每天准点将爱心午餐送到医护人员手中。

活动开展两周来，西创会、西雅图新移民之家、西雅图地产投资俱乐部、阳光青少年基金会、广府会等非营利组织均对活动给予大力支持与协助，尤其是蔡和蔡律师事务所的蔡清律师、Sylvia Chin女士、美国经纬有限公司李若垚、张硕夫妇、华大在校生Rhea，他们在项目前期不仅带头捐赠资金，还花费了大量时间为项目的推进做出杰出贡献，一共有三十几个志愿者组成的工作小组在为这个活动服务，他们来自各个非营利组织、捐赠单位、社区、政府、大学、高中……

截至4月11日，爱心午餐已送出3845份，UW Virology、Swedish Hospital、Overlake Hospital、Evergreen Hospital等15家重点抗疫医院的675位医护工作者们已经享用到了这些爱心午餐。送餐范围还将扩大，活动还将普及到更多医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员。医护工作者们对本次活动也表示了由衷感谢。很多医护人员收到爱心午餐后都感激不尽，纷纷在社交媒体上分享自己的爱心午餐，用自己独特的方式致谢“爱心午餐”，并纷纷@这些爱心餐厅给他们“打广告”。

人间芳菲四月天，这个本应是最美的季节，参与“爱心午餐”的所有人却无暇欣赏大美春光，他们每天更为忙碌，为抗击疫情而奉献一己之力。现在为了使大家更全面了解“爱心午餐”的规划，聆听这些餐饮企业参与本次活动的初心，以及外送平台Chowbus如何做到及时连接餐厅与医院的，CCCWA将于4月13日西雅图时间2:00PM至3:30PM举行线上新闻发布会。届时，各餐厅负责人、协办机构负责人、工作组成员，将和大家分享这次“爱心午餐”背后的故事。如果您是西雅图的中文媒体、自媒体人以及有意向的合作单位或个人，诚邀您参加本次线上分享活动。

发布会简介 发布会时间：4月13日 2:00pm-3:30pm Zoom 网络直播链接: https://washington.zoom.us/j/766492115

发布会流程：主办单位CCCWA会长吕莉莉介绍活动概况Bellevue市议员李瑞麟先生发言蔡清律师介绍项目的法律事务联络组组长Sylvia介绍受捐医院情况配送组组长Michelle介绍配送情况财务组组长李晓艳介绍捐物资及资金情况文宣组组长Grace发言、英文媒体负责人Rhea发言三位领捐餐厅代表发言（豆捞坊、IJ sushi 、颐和园）协办机构发言募捐组组长那济源发言互动问答环节

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT)

西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

items.title_en: April 3rd Update: Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Charity Tracking Report
items.title_zh: 4月3日CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐公益追踪报道
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from across Seattle.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议、豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“ 抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐活动”...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from across Seattle. Over the past few days, organizations on the front lines of the pandemic response that have received love lunches include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital. This drive carefully selected trusted, reliable restaurants and food delivery partners, strictly following Washington State food safety standards for preparation and transport, delivering nutritious, delicious love lunches directly to medical staff. All purchased food is coordinated closely with local medical institutions at every level, maintaining point-to-point contact with recipient hospitals.

The Love Lunch fundraising call received an enthusiastic response, with organizations such as the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club providing strong support and assistance. Following the lead of The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, as of the evening of April 2nd, four more restaurants — Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou — have joined as donors, together pledging to fully fund 14,150 lunches, with 1,515 love lunches already prepared and delivered to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. $21,085 in cash donations have been raised.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop (contact via email), Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议、豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐活动”得到了西雅图各界的热烈回应。 过去几天奋战在抗疫第一线收到爱心午餐的单位包括：UW Virology 华大病毒实验室、Swedish Hospital 瑞士医院、Overlake Hospital 欧弗莱克医院、Evergreen Hospital 长青医院。 这次活动挑选了安全可靠的餐饮企业和食品配送企业，严格按照华州食品安全标准生产和运输，将营养美味的爱心午餐送到医护人员手上。所采购食品，均通过与本地各级医疗机构密切沟通后，与受赠医院保持点对点联系.

爱心午餐募捐倡议推出后反响热烈,西雅图创业协会等多个组织给与此次活动大力支持和协助。继豆捞坊和IJ sushine领捐后，截止4月2日晚，已有颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾鱼乡、刘一手 4家餐厅新加入到捐赠单位队伍中，共承诺全资捐赠午餐14,150份，并已制作了1,515份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。募集到现金捐赠$21,085美元。

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: CCCWA's 4th 'Star of the Week' Livestream Continues!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第4期CCCWA“每周一星“热线继续热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's guests were experienced accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng of Proctor Company, who gave a special presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues.'
items.summary_zh: 本期的受邀嘉宾是美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，他们为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。
items.body_en:
This episode's guests were experienced accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng of Proctor Company, who gave a special presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues.'

The two guests shared professional tax knowledge, focusing on: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset and other information reporting; Bitcoin taxation; retirement plan strategies; and depreciation issues related to rental real estate.

Nearly forty people attended the online lecture, with an enthusiastic response. Both professionals provided precise data and shared real case studies, answering attendees' questions on the spot, and everyone came away with new insights. Everyone hopes CCCWA will continue hosting similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals, and affirmed CCCWA's efforts in serving the community.
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾是美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，他们为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。

两位嘉宾为大家提供专业的税务知识，着重分享了以下内容：新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室海外资产以及其他信息申报/Bitcoin（比特币)的纳税促进退休计划房地产出租后相关的折旧问题/房地产出租后相关的折旧问题

近四十位朋友出席了网络讲座，反应热烈。两位专业人士提供了精准的数据和实际案例的分享，并且当场解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 参会人员受到了启发。 大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。 同时, 大家肯定了CCCWA对服务社区的努力。

items.title_en: Fighting COVID-19: Love Lunch Fundraising Drive Update
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐募捐活动更新报道
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant industry, with these restaurants together pledging a combined $242,250 worth of roughly 14,150 nutritious meal packages to show their thanks and respect for medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response.
items.summary_zh: 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、 颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等领捐的“抗击疫...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant industry, with these restaurants together pledging a combined $242,250 worth of roughly 14,150 nutritious meal packages to show their thanks and respect for medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response!

As of the evening of April 7th, the restaurants participating in the drive — despite their own businesses being hit hard by the pandemic — have continued to generously give back to society. Through their funding and staffing, they have already prepared 2,535 love lunches (worth a combined $45,525) and delivered them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need.

The 'Love Lunch' drive is proceeding vigorously and smoothly. It has also received enthusiastic support from across the community, with donation totals growing by the day. CCCWA has already received $26,479 in cash donations from generous community members, and many hope to donate even more love lunches through our platform. With the virus still spreading, frontline medical workers have chosen to fight day and night to protect our health, and we too should do our small part, offering our gratitude in the form of a donated meal for these hardworking medical workers!

Right now, frontline medical staff fighting the pandemic at UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital have already enjoyed these love lunches. Many medical workers, upon receiving their love lunches, were deeply grateful and expressed their thanks to CCCWA and the sponsoring restaurants through social media! Staff at UW Virology posted on Facebook: 'These love lunches are simply delicious.' The 'Love Lunch' drive will continue to expand its reach to more medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. These freshly prepared, nutritious meal packages have brought us closer to medical staff and community service workers, united in the same spirit of love and gratitude.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop (contact via email), Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮界的热烈响应，他们共同承诺提供总价值$242,250 美金，约14,150份营养套餐，以表达对奋战在抗疫前线的医护人员的感谢和敬意！

截至4月7日晚，参与爱心活动的几家餐厅在生意受到疫情打击下，依然慷慨尽力为社会做贡献。他们出资金、安排人力已制作完成2,535份爱心午餐(合计$4,5525美金）并送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。

“爱心午餐”活动开展得如火如荼并且有条不紊地进行着。活动也得到社会各界的热情支持，爱心捐款数目与日俱增。CCCWA已经收到了各界热心人士的现金捐赠美金$26,479，大家希望通过我们的平台捐赠更多的爱心餐。病毒当前，前线的医务人员选择日夜奋战，全力保护着我们的健康，我们也当进绵薄之力，为辛苦的医务人员捐上一份感激之心!

现在，UW Virology、Swedish Hospital、Overlake Hospital 、Evergreen Hospital 医院里奋战在抗疫一线的医护人员们已经享用到爱心午餐。很多医护人员收到爱心午餐后都感激不尽，通过自媒体发表了他们对CCCWA和赞助餐厅的感谢心声！ UW Virology的医护人员在Facebook上说：“这些爱心午餐简直太美味了“。 “爱心午餐”活动还将普及到更多医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。新鲜烹制的爱心营养套餐将我们和医疗人员、社区服务人员拉近了距离，我们都有同样的爱心和感恩之情。

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 The Dolar Shop（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （Chengdu Memory) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

items.title_en: CCCWA's 5th 'Star of the Week' Livestream Draws Huge Popularity!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第5期CCCWA“每周一星“超高人气热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's guest, Mr. Ming Zhang, is the founder of MZA Architecture, an internationally renowned architectural design firm whose projects range from custom private villas to mid- and high-rise apartments, hotels, and commercial centers.
items.summary_zh: ​本期的受邀嘉宾张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司， 项目...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Mr. Ming Zhang, is the founder of MZA Architecture, an internationally renowned architectural design firm whose projects range from custom private villas to mid- and high-rise apartments, hotels, and commercial centers. Mr. Zhang shared creative architecture, interior, and planning design services from both the local market and China.

Over the past two years, Seattle's rise as a cloud computing hub has drawn large numbers of tech talent, driving an all-around economic boom including real estate. Population growth has translated directly into housing demand, and Seattle home price growth has consistently led the nation. Mr. Zhang shared key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate, the main development and design process, and the differences in design requirements between the two cities.

Nearly 80 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom, responding enthusiastically to Mr. Zhang's presentation, with continuous questions and interaction with the guest throughout the evening. Everyone thanked the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司，项目 从私人定制别墅，到多层及高层公寓，酒店，及商业中心等。张铭先生分享了本地以及中国的富有创意的建筑，室内和规划设计服务。

近两年，西雅图作为云计算中心吸引了大量IT高科技人才，同时带动了本地区房地产等全方面的经济腾飞。人口的增长转化成为住房的需求，西雅图房价涨幅连续领跑全美。 张铭先生分享了投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产需要注意的要点、开发设计的主要流程和两个城市对设计要求的区别

近80位朋友通过ZOOM参加了“云聚会”，对张总的介绍反应热烈，当晚会议进行中不断与嘉宾提问互动。大家感谢华盛顿州中国总商会组织这次专业知识讲座为大家提供广泛接触的机会和信息交流的平台。

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Joins Forces Across the Community in the Active Fight Against the Pandemic
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会联合社会各界积极抗疫
items.summary_en: Since the CCCWA Foundation's donation channel launched on March 20th, it has partnered with the Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle, the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association, and Chamber member companies to form a working group that raised nearly $39,000 in cash donations and close to $100,000 worth of supplies from across the community within just one week.
items.summary_zh: ​华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（以下称CCCWA Foundation）捐赠通道自3月20日启动以来，联合厦门大学西雅图校友会（Xiamen University Alumni Association in...
items.body_en:
Since the CCCWA Foundation's donation channel launched on March 20th, it has partnered with the Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle, the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association, and Chamber member companies to form a working group that raised, within just one week, nearly $39,000 in cash donations and close to $100,000 worth of supplies from across the community — delivering supplies donated by member company Systimmune Inc. to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center on the very day the channel launched.

The entire fundraising effort brought together tens of thousands of acts of generosity time and again, bearing witness to an unprecedented level of unity within the Chinese community. As soon as the call went out, over a hundred people joined the CCCWA Foundation donation group, while the Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association and the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association separately rallied and fundraised within their own alumni groups, bringing total participation to over 300 people. Donors included not only Chinese-invested businesses, prominent entrepreneurs, dignitaries, and professionals across industries in the Seattle area, but also many local organizations and generous individuals — many of whom had already donated multiple times yet still chose to give again. All of this effort was possible because we share a common goal and wish: to stand united, fight COVID-19, and protect our community!

During this extraordinary period of overwhelmed courier services and disrupted shipping routes, the CCCWA Foundation working group raced against time to coordinate with various organizations, ensuring the quality and safety of supplies, and worked with professional trading companies to deliver them to the Seattle area as quickly as possible. To date, the CCCWA Foundation has visited 14 organizations, donating 82,000 masks and 1,500 sets of protective supplies (including medical gloves, protective gowns, and goggles), with a large batch of additional supplies still in transit. The donations received heartfelt thanks and recognition from recipient organizations, and the image of a united Chinese community resonated widely, drawing coverage from mainstream media outlets such as KIRO 7.

On March 27th, the working group delivered supplies to Issaquah Swedish Hospital, which hospital staff carried directly to ICU medical workers. The medical staff called it help arriving exactly when needed, thanking the Chinese community for its care and protection.

KIRO 7 coverage: CCCWA Foundation representatives and Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association representatives

Swedish Hospital ICU staff receiving the supplies

On March 31st, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives delivered donations to Virginia Mason Medical Center, Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center, and the Bellevue Police and Fire Departments. Virginia Mason CEO Gary Kaplan sent a personal letter of thanks to the CCCWA Foundation.

Representatives donating to Virginia Mason Medical Center

Representatives donating to Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center

Representatives donating to Bellevue City Hall

From April 1st to 3rd, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives made back-to-back visits to deliver donations to UW Valley Medical Center, Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Medical Center, the International Community Health Services (ICHS) International District Medical and Dental Clinic, and Burien's Highline Medical Center. Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta personally wrote a letter of thanks to the CCCWA Foundation, writing movingly: 'As COVID-19 ravages our community, your help has shown us a light of hope at the end of the tunnel. Our entire community thanks you.'

Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta's letter of thanks

Dr. Martin Walker posted his thanks on Facebook

The CCCWA President and Seattle Real Estate Club representatives donating to Overlake Medical Center

Representatives donating to the ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic

Representatives donating to UW Valley Medical Center

Evergreen Hospital doctors receiving the donation

Washington State's outbreak has now begun to stabilize — not only because of the tireless efforts of doctors and the cooperation of the broader community, but also because of the unified dedication and support of the entire Chinese community. Many of us are first-generation immigrants; we draw on strength from our home country to support the home we live in now, because we deeply love this land. Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community. The CCCWA Foundation will continue rallying the community to donate, until victory is declared in this fight against the pandemic! (Report and photos by Carrie Wang — CCCWA Foundation)

Hosted by: CCCWA Foundation

Partner organizations: Xiamen University Alumni Association Seattle (XMUAASEATTLE), ICBC USA, Modern Land Seattle LLC, MY International Real Estate, Onelin Capital Corporation, Create World Real Estate, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Systimmune Inc., iSoftStone, adSage, Washington Property, Chinese American Mixed Family Association, 505 Group, China-US-Canada Friendship Association

The donation channel is now open. Donors, donated items and quantities, and recipient details will be transparently published on an ongoing basis. Please continue to follow the CCCWA Foundation for details on the donation drive. 'Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community!'

Ways to donate funds:
1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, email: [contact via email]
2. Online wire transfer/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation, Checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024. Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040.

Ways to donate supplies:
Please contact any of the following task force member organizations to coordinate:
1. CCCWA Foundation Task Force: [contact via email], Phone: 206-661-8187
2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: [contact via email], Phone: 302-358-0366

Text and photos courtesy of: CCCWA Foundation
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（以下称CCCWA Foundation）捐赠通道自3月20日启动以来，联合厦门大学西雅图校友会（Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle）、浙江大学北美西雅图校友会（Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni）、总商会会员单位组成工作组，在短短一周内共筹集来自社会各界的资金捐赠近3万9千美金以及价值近10万美金的物资，并在通道启动当天将百利药业（SystimmuneInc）捐赠的物资送达Everett Providence Hospital及Overlake Medical Center.

整个筹款过程一次又一次凝聚了数万的爱心，见证了华人空前的团结。倡议书一经发出就号召聚集了百人加入CCCWA Foundation捐赠群，同时厦门大学西雅图校友会及浙江大学北美西雅图校友会分别在其校友群中进行号召和筹款，总参与人数超过300人。 此次捐赠者中不仅有西雅图地区的中资企业、知名企业家、政要、来自各行各业的精英，还有众多本地机构、组织和爱心人士，其中许多个人和单位已经几度捐款，但依旧再次献出爱心；所有的努力都因为我们有着共同的目标和心愿：团结一心、抗击新冠、保护社区！

在快递爆仓，航路不畅的特殊时期，CCCWA Foundation工作组争分夺秒对接各单位，确保物资的质量及安全性。并在专业外贸公司的协助下尽可能以最高的速度送达西雅图地区。截至日前，CCCWA Foundation共前往14家机构，捐出8万2千个口罩及1500套防护物资（含医用手套、防护服及护目镜）, 仍有大批物品还在运送途中。捐赠得到了受赠单位由衷的感谢和肯定，华人众志成城的形象深入人心，并被主流媒体：如KIRO 7电视频道报道。

3月27日工作组将物资送达Issaquah Swedish Hospital, 并由医院工作人员直接送至ICU的医护手中。医护人员都称这真是雪中送炭，感谢来自中国社区的关爱和保护。

KIRO7报道: CCCWA Foundation 代表及厦门大学西雅图校友会代表

Swedish HospitalICU的医护人员接收物资

3月31日CCCWA Foundation工作组代表前往Virginia Mason Medical Center、Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center及Bellevue市警察局、消防局进行捐赠。Virginia Mason的CEO Gary Kaplan特别发信致谢CCCWA Foundation。

代表向Virginia Mason Medical Center捐赠

代表向Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center捐赠

代表向Bellevue市政厅捐赠

4月1日至3日，CCCWA Foundation工作组代表马不停蹄前往UW Valley Medical Center、Evergreen Hospital、Overlake Medical Center、中国城ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic、Burien Highline Medial Center进行捐赠。Burien市长Jimmy Matta亲自致信感谢CCCWA Foundation，并动情地写到：“在新冠病毒COVID-19肆虐我们社区的时候，你们的帮助让我们看到了隧道尽头的希望之光。我们整个社区都感谢你们。”

Burien市长Jimmy Matta的感谢信

医生Martin Walker在Facebook页面发文致谢

CCCWA主席和西雅图地产俱乐部代表向Overlake Medical Center捐赠

代表向ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic捐赠

代表向UW Valley Medical Center捐赠

Evergreen Hospital医生接收捐赠

目前华盛顿州疫情趋于稳定，这不仅因为医生们奋不顾身的努力和社会各界的配合，更因为有整个华人社区一致的奉献与支持。我们中许多人是第一代移民，我们汇聚来自母国的力量共同支援现在的家园，因为我们深爱这片土地。滴水汇江河，绵力助社区。CCCWA Foundation将继续团结社会各界进行捐赠，直到抗疫之战吹响胜利的号角！ （图文报道：王洋Carrie Wang-CCCWA Foundation）

主办单位：华盛顿州中国总商会基金会CCCWA FOUNDATION 合作单位：厦门大学西雅图校友会 XMUAASEATTLE 工银美国 ICBC USA 当代置业 Modern Land Seattle LLC 梅高国际地产MY International Real Estate 一林资本Onelin Capital Corporation 拓宏美国Create World Real Estate 西雅图房地产俱乐部 Seattle Real Estate Investment Club 百利药业Systimmune lnc. 软通动力 iSoftStone 艾德思奇Adsage 华宇房地产公司 Washington Property 中美家庭协会 Chinese American mixed family association 505 集团公司 505 Group 中美加友好协会 China-US-Canada Friendship Association

items.title_en: 5th 'Star of the Week' Guest Ming Zhang (MZA Architecture) Shares 'US Real Estate Development Investment and the Design Process'
items.title_zh: 第五期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾张铭 （MZA建筑设计事务所）分享《美国房地产开发投资和设计流程》
items.summary_en: Main topics included: key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate; the main development and design process for Seattle and Bellevue real estate and the differences in design requirements between the two cities; government land-use approval requirements.
items.summary_zh: 主要内容包括： 投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产需要注意的要点 投资 Seattle和Bellevue房地产开发设计的主要 流程和两个城市对设计要求的 区别 政府审批...
items.body_en:
Main topics included: key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate; the main development and design process for Seattle and Bellevue real estate and the differences in design requirements between the two cities; government land-use approval requirements; approval steps in the design process; and standards to keep in mind during the design process.

Speaker introduction: Ming Zhang, FAIA is the founding Partner of MZA Architecture headquartered in Seattle. He is an award-winning designer specializing in large-scale mixed-use and high-rise building design. His work has covered the US, Asia, and the Middle East. He is a sought-after speaker, particularly on the topics of high-rise building design, urban design, and overall culture and design. He has presented and written essays for international academic organizations such as CTBUH, AIA, and over 30 international design conferences and universities. He is NCARB certified and holds a Master of Architecture from the Illinois Institute of Technology.

MZA is an internationally-renowned architectural design firm with offices located in Bellevue, Washington and Shanghai, China. It provides innovative architecture, design, interiors, and planning services. For local developers and Chinese investors in the Puget Sound area, MZA builds projects ranging from custom single-family homes to mid- and high-rise office buildings, apartments, condominiums, retail centers, and hotels. Current projects in the greater Seattle area under design include two high-rise apartment towers, one high-rise hotel, and numerous mid-rise apartment projects. Its projects in China are even larger in scale, with buildings reaching as high as 500 meters.

Friday, April 24th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, April 25th, 8:00–9:30 AM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869# US (San Jose)

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State
Co-hosted by: Seattle Real Estate Investment Club
items.body_zh:
主要内容包括：投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产需要注意的要点 投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产开发设计的主要流程和两个城市对设计要求的区别 政府审批土地使用的要求 设计过程的审批步骤 设计过程中需要注意的标准规范

主讲嘉宾介绍：张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，他是一个荣获众多奖项的国际著名建筑师，尤其以大型城市综合体以及高层建筑设计为专长。他的作品遍布在美国，亚洲和中东。他也是一个广受欢迎的演说者，尤其在高层建筑，文化与建筑以及绿色建筑领域。在世界高层建筑协会，美国和中国建筑师学会，以及30多个国际学术会议上发表文章和演讲。他是美国注册建筑师和美国建筑师学会的院士会员。

Ming Zhang, FAIA is the founding Partner of MZA Architecture headquartered in Seattle. He is a award winning designer that specialized in large scale Mixed-use and High-rise building design. His work has covered the US, Asia and Middle East. He is a sought-after speaker, particularly in the topics of high-rise building design, urban design and overall culture and design. He has presented and written essays for international academic organizations such as CTBUH, AIA, and over 30 International Design conferences and Universities. He is NCARB certified and has a Master of Architecture from Illinois Institute of Technology.

MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司。总部位于美国贝尔维市，并在上海设有办公室。本司为本地以及来自中国的开发商和投资人提供富有创意的建筑，室内和规划设计服务。项目种类从私人定制别墅，到多层及高层公寓，酒店，及商业中心等。目前正在设计中的大西雅图地区项目包括二栋高层公寓，一栋高层酒店，以及众多多层公寓项目。中国的项目更是规模巨大，最高建筑达500米之高。

MZA is an internationally-renowned architectural design firm with offices located in Bellevue, Washington and Shanghai, China. We provide innovative architecture, design, interiors, and planning services. For local developers and Chinese investors in the Puget Sound area, we buildprojects ranging from custom single-family homes to mid and high-rise office buildings, apartments, condominiums, retail centers, and hotels. For clients in China, we design large-scale, mixed-use building projects that can reach as high as 500 meters.

items.title_en: The 4th Guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' Series: We Specially Invited Experienced Proctor Company Accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng to Share a Special Presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues'
items.title_zh: 第四期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。
items.summary_en: Main topics included: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset reporting requirements.
items.summary_zh: 主要内容包括： 新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金 2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室...
items.body_en:
Main topics included: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset and other information reporting; Bitcoin taxation; retirement plan strategies; and depreciation issues related to rental real estate.

Speaker Annie Zheng holds a bachelor's and master's degree from Beijing Foreign Studies University, a bachelor's degree in Accounting from the University of Washington, and a Master of Tax Law from Golden Gate University. She is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. Her specialties include tax issues for new immigrants, including reporting foreign assets, corporate accounts, and investment income; and US real estate tax issues for foreign investors, including ITIN applications. Annie is also an IRS-approved Certifying Acceptance Agent (CAA), able to certify passports for foreign nationals.

Speaker Steven Yun holds a bachelor's degree from the University of Hong Kong and a Master's in Accounting from the University of Washington. He is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. He has extensive experience in corporate tax planning, including business formation, entity structuring, and profit distribution strategy. With long experience dealing with the IRS and state tax authorities, he helps clients minimize audit risk.

CCCWA arranged this lecture with these two tax experts, hoping it will help everyone with their work and life in the US.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869#
items.body_zh:
主要内容包括：新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室海外资产以及其他信息申报/Bitcoin（比特币)的纳税促进退休计划房地产出租后相关的折旧问题/房地产出租后相关的折旧问题

主讲嘉宾Annie Zheng获得北京外国语大学学士及硕士学位，华盛顿大学会计学学士学位，同时拥有Golden Gate University 税法硕士学位。 是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA 会员。专业的领域为新移民税务问题，其中包括海外资产，公司账目和投资收入的申报；外国人投资美国房地产税务问题，其中包括税号申请。Annie同时为国税局批准的CAA 代表，可以为外国人进行护照的认证。

主讲嘉宾Steven Yun先生拥有香港大学学士学位，华盛顿大学会计硕士学位，是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA会员。在为公司进行税务计划方面很有经验，其中包括公司的起步，公司结构和利润分配方式的选择。拥有长期与国税局以及洲税务部门打交道的经验，可以在帮助客户在审计中规避风险 .

CCCWA安排以上两位税务专家的讲座，希望能对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。

报名方式 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,4696970869#

items.title_en: The 3rd Guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' Series: We Specially Invited CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Lani Cao to Present on 'Recent Policy Changes to Visas and Green Cards Available to Multinational Companies in the US'
items.title_zh: 第三期CCCWA“每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了CCCWA 法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师介绍'跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和绿卡近期政策变化"
items.summary_en: Attorney Cao will introduce the types of visas and immigration pathways available to multinational companies in the US: Investment immigration (EB-5), extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A), entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C), employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3), and E1/E2, TN visas for nationals of Canada, New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions.
items.summary_zh: 曹律师将介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和移民种类：  投资移民：EB-5 特殊人才移民：Eb-1A 企业家签证及绿卡：L-1/L-2， Eb-1C 职业移民：EB-1/ EB-2/...
items.body_en:
Attorney Cao will introduce the types of visas and immigration pathways available to multinational companies in the US: Investment immigration (EB-5); extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A); entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C); employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3); and E1/E2, TN visas for nationals of Canada, New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions. We hope Attorney Cao's expert lecture will be helpful for everyone's work and life in the US.

Attorney Cao earned her undergraduate degree from China University of Political Science and Law, followed by a Master's in Public Policy from Japan's National Graduate Institute for Policy Studies and a J.D. from Seattle University School of Law. While practicing law in China, she focused on Chinese business law and served as legal counsel to a major Chinese fuel company. She has also co-authored publications on Chinese law. After immigrating to the US and earning her J.D. from Seattle University School of Law, she began her US legal practice. Whether in immigration law, family law, business law, or estate planning, Attorney Cao brings extensive experience, tailoring immigration strategies to each client's needs to help them achieve the American dream — including investment immigration (EB-5 direct investment and regional centers), employment-based immigration (EB-1, EB-2, EB-3), family-based immigration, various nonimmigrant visa applications (H-1B, etc.), and corporate law services. Attorney Cao is also active in numerous Seattle Chinese community activities. She has been invited to host a legal advice segment on Seattle Chinese radio and writes an immigration law column for The China Press, providing legal guidance on immigration matters to Chinese community members across the greater Seattle area.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Friday, April 10th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869
items.body_zh:
曹律师将介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和移民种类： 投资移民：EB-5特殊人才移民：Eb-1A企业家签证及绿卡：L-1/L-2， Eb-1C职业移民：EB-1/ EB-2/ EB-3加拿大，新西兰，台湾，香港等国家或地区： E1/E2, TN 希望曹律师的专业讲座对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。

曹律师早年在中国政法大学获得大学学士学位，并先后在日本国立政策研究院和西雅图大学法学院获得公共政策硕士以及法学博士学位。在中国从事律师执业期间，她主要集中于中国商务法，并在中国一家大型燃料公司担任法律顾问。曹律师也曾与他人一起合著关于中国法律方面的著作。 移民美国后，曹律师在西雅图大学法学院获得法学博士学位后开始了在美国的法律实践。无论是移民法，家庭法，商业法或是遗产规划，曹律师都有非常丰富的经验,根据不同的需求，更加全面地为客户量身定制移民策略，帮助客户实现美国梦,包括投资移民（EB-5直投、区域中心）、工作移民（EB-1，EB-2， EB-3）、亲属移民、各类非移民签证（H-1B等）的申请以及公司法等服务。 曹律师也积极参加众多西雅图华人社区活动。她受邀担任西雅图中文电台曹律师信箱；侨报移民法律栏目的撰稿人，为大西雅图地区的华人朋友们提供关于移民方面的法律咨询。

报名方式: 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： 美西时间4月10日周五晚间8PM-9:30PM (北京时间周六上午11AM-12:30PM) Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869

items.title_en: 3rd 'Star of the Week' Tracking Report
items.title_zh: 第三期CCCWA“每周一星”追踪报道
items.summary_en: The guest for the 3rd episode of 'Star of the Week' was CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Attorney Lani Cao.
items.summary_zh: ​ 第三期“每周一星“的做客嘉宾是CCCWA法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师。
items.body_en:
The guest for the 3rd episode of 'Star of the Week' was CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Attorney Lani Cao.

Attorney Cao first introduced the types of visas available to multinational companies in the US and their applicability, including: investment immigration (EB-5), extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A), entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C), employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3), E1/E2 visas for nationals of New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions, and TN visas for Canada and Mexico. She also addressed recent policy changes affecting green cards, noting that the global pandemic outbreak has affected USCIS processing timelines, and green card form submissions should closely follow USCIS announcements. Attorney Cao's law office will continue tracking the latest USCIS updates to help keep everyone informed!

Drawing on her rich work experience and real case studies, Attorney Cao promptly answered attendees' questions. CCCWA will continue to host similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals. CCCWA provides a win-win platform for exchange, sharing, and cooperation.
items.body_zh:
第三期“每周一星“的做客嘉宾是CCCWA法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师。

曹律师首先向大家介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证种类和适用性，包括了：投资移民投资移民EB-5，特殊人才移民Eb-1A，企业家签证及绿卡L-1/L-2， Eb-1C，职业移民EB-1/ EB-2/ EB-3，新西兰，台湾，香港等国家或地区人士的 E1/E2, 加拿大，墨西哥的 TN 另外针对绿卡近期政策变化，曹律师强调全球这次疫情爆发，当下移民局的工作进程收到影响，绿卡的表格提交需要密切关注移民局公告。曹律师事务所会及时追踪移民局的最新动态，以便帮助大家了解更新的信息！

专业人士结合丰富的工作经历和实际案例的分享，及时解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。CCCWA是为大家提供交流、分享、合作的共赢平台。

items.title_en: The 2nd 'Star of the Week' Livestream Continues! Ms. Frances Chen Gives a Special Presentation on How to Do Online Marketing in the US Market
items.title_zh: 第二期CCCWA“每周一星“热线继续热播！Frances Chen女士为大家专题分享美国市场如何进行网络推广
items.summary_en: This episode's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Frances Chen, adSage's US Marketing Director, who introduced the business value of digital advertising powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising in China and the US.
items.summary_zh: ​ 本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了adSage美国市场营销总监Frances...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Frances Chen, adSage's US Marketing Director, who introduced the business value of digital advertising powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising in China and the US. Amid the current global pandemic, many company employees have been forced to work from home and retail stores have shut down — in these extraordinary times, digital online marketing has shown its remarkable power, letting businesses across every industry reach their audiences and buyers across borders. Frances introduced several platforms and ad formats well suited for this.

Frances Chen shared with online attendees the services of adSage, a globally leading digital marketing company, introducing its major clients including Amazon, Microsoft, Vipshop, Uber, Ashford, Blue Nile, and GoDaddy, giving everyone a broader understanding of the development of the internet advertising industry.
items.body_zh:
本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了adSage美国市场营销总监Frances Chen女士向大家介绍网络营销借助通信和数字媒体技术推动的数字广告的商业价值,中美两地数字广告的发展现状及展望。在全球这次疫情爆发的当下，很多公司员工被迫在家办公，零售商店暂停营业，在特殊时期数字化网络营销发挥神奇力量，让各个行业跨国界联系到企业的受众群以及买家。Frances 介绍了一些比较适合大家的投放平台以及广告投放形式。

Frances Chen与在线的朋友们分享了全球领先的数字营销公司adSage 的服务，并向大家介绍主要的客户为亚马逊、微软、唯品会、Uber,Ashford、Blue Nile、Go Daddy等， 为大家普及了互联网广告行业的发展。

items.title_en: 6th 'Star of the Week' Guest Grace Chen (American Express Financial) Shares 'How to Achieve Diversified Asset Allocation'
items.title_zh: 第六期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾Grace Chen （美信金融）分享《如何实现多元分散的资产配置》
items.summary_en: As communications technology moves into the 5G era, many industries hope to use social platforms to promote their products worldwide, improving customer satisfaction and achieving a win-win for businesses and customers alike. American Express Financial is exactly that kind of financial services company — using internet platform technology to connect with high-quality global asset management firms, bringing alternative investment opportunities once reserved only for institutions to everyday individual investors, helping them achieve diversified asset allocation.
items.summary_zh: 通信科技即将跨入 5G 时代，许多行业都希望通过社交平台将产品推广到世界各地以提高客户的满意度，并做到企业与客户的双赢。美信金融正是这样的金融服务公司：基于互联网平台技术，对接高质量全球资产管理公司，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现多元分散的资产配置。...
items.body_en:
As communications technology moves into the 5G era, many industries hope to use social platforms to promote their products worldwide, improving customer satisfaction and achieving a win-win for businesses and customers alike. American Express Financial is exactly that kind of financial services company — using internet platform technology to connect with high-quality global asset management firms, bringing alternative investment opportunities once reserved only for institutions to everyday individual investors, helping them achieve diversified asset allocation.

Speaker: Grace Chen, President of American Express Financial North America. Grace Chen previously worked in PMG's investment development department and as a development and financing manager at Greenland USA. She holds FINRA Series 7 and 63 licenses, and a dual bachelor's degree in Financial Mathematics and Economics from Binghamton University, SUNY.

Friday, May 1st, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, May 2nd, 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869#
items.body_zh:
通信科技即将跨入5G时代，许多行业都希望通过社交平台将产品推广到世界各地以提高客户的满意度，并做到企业与客户的双赢。美信金融正是这样的金融服务公司：基于互联网平台技术，对接高质量全球资产管理公司，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现多元分散的资产配置。

主讲嘉宾美信金融北美区总裁：做客嘉宾Grace Chen Grace Chen曾就职于PMG投资拓展部及绿地美国开发及融资经理；持有Finra系列7和63执照；纽约州立大学宾汉姆顿金融数学及经济双学士。

美西时间周五5月01日8pm-9:30，（北京时间周六5月2日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,4696970869#

items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第6期CCCWA“每周一星持续“高人气热播！

items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Grace Chen, President of American Express Financial North America, gathered virtually with attendees for the evening, sharing professional insights on diversified asset allocation to help individual investors understand different investment portfolio strategies.

Main topics of the lecture:
- The role of alternative investments within a portfolio
- Portfolio products worth considering during extraordinary times
- Hedge-style life settlement funds
- Tax-advantaged Opportunity Zone investments

Nearly 60 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom, responding enthusiastically to the introduction to American Express Financial, with continuous questions and interaction with the guest throughout the evening. Everyone thanked the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.

Recording link: https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/5ZJHaI7TsVpOGtL19VrfVohmDLbHaaa81yUX-aYNyof_18qn5yuzuVLqK9QAppY
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾美信金融北美区总裁Grace Chen当晚与参会来宾隔空聚会，从专业角度带给大家实现多元分散的资产配置信息分享，帮助广大个人投资者了解投资领域的不同组合计划。

讲座涉及的主要内容： - 配置另类投资对于投资组合的作用 - 特殊时期可以考虑组合配置产品 - 避险型投资保单贴现基金 - 避税型Opportunity Zone 机会区域型的投资

items.title_en: CCCWA's 7th 'Star of the Week' Draws Huge Popularity!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第7期CCCWA每周一星高人气热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's featured speaker was Ms. Holly Yang, Senior Vice President and Partner at Kidder Mathews, a leading West Coast commercial real estate firm.
items.summary_zh: 本期的主讲嘉宾是 西海岸领先的商业地产公司Kidder Mathews 高级副总裁 ，合伙人 Holly Yang 杨晓红女士。...
items.body_en:
This episode's featured speaker was Ms. Holly Yang, Senior Vice President and Partner at Kidder Mathews, a leading West Coast commercial real estate firm. Holly is a well-known expert in Seattle's commercial real estate community, and the first Chinese American in the Seattle area to earn the CCIM (Certified Commercial Investment Member) designation. With nearly 15 years in the industry, Holly has helped countless overseas investors achieve precise cross-border investment matches and maximize investor returns, and has been invited to speak at major business forums on market trend forecasting, legal topics, and international business courses.

Drawing on her real-world experience, Holly shared insights on West Coast US commercial real estate investment and walked through classic successful case studies from her 15 years in the field. She also addressed the current impact of the pandemic on the market and the outlook for after the pandemic, using professional data and her investment experience to introduce portfolio products investors might consider during extraordinary times and the role alternative investments can play in a portfolio.

Nearly 50 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom. Everyone thanked Kidder Mathews and the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.

Recording link: https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/2sBrFZbd7GBOHK_O-miYfL85EoH1eaa80CccrqFez06Wk3V45UZNNwHAftPE8xVS?startTime=1588991979000
items.body_zh:
本期的主讲嘉宾是西海岸领先的商业地产公司Kidder Mathews 高级副总裁，合伙人Holly Yang 杨晓红女士。 Holly是西雅图商业地产界的知名专家,她是西雅图地区首位获得“国际注册商业地产投资师”资质的华人。从业近15年，Holly帮助了无数的海外投资人实现跨国投资精准对接，并取得投资人利益最大化并且受邀各大商业论坛进行市场趋势预测，法律讲座和国际商业课程。

Holly以实际工作经验，通过讲座与大家分享了美国西海岸的商业地产的投资内容,以及过往15年的经典成功案例分析。 另外针对当前疫情对市场的影响和疫情过后的市场展望，Holly以专业数据为依据，结合投资经验，介绍了投资人在特殊时期可以考虑的组合配置产品以及配置另类投资对于投资组合的作用。

近50位朋友通过ZOOM参加了“云聚会”，大家感谢Kindder Mathews 与华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA组织这次专业知识讲座为大家提供广泛接触的机会和信息交流的平台。

讲座回播链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/2sBrFZbd7GBOHK_O-miYfL85EoH1eaa80CccrqFez06Wk3V45UZNNwHAftPE8xVS?startTime=1588991979000

items.title_en: 8th 'Star of the Week' Guest Qinghua Pei Shares 'What Philosophy Should Companies Embrace to Align with International Standards, How Can They Strengthen Management, and What Are the Trends in Operations Management?'
items.title_zh: 第八期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾裴庆华分享“企业秉承怎样的理念才能与国际接轨，怎样才能提升管理力，运营管理的趋势是什么。”
items.summary_en: Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), discusses: in a globalized environment, companies face many operational challenges. What philosophy should a company embrace to be considered internationally aligned? What traits do benchmark companies share? What kind of leadership effectively drives management improvement, and what are the trends in operations management?
items.summary_zh: CCI竞能咨询国际原中国区总经理裴庆华与大家 探讨：在全球化背景下企业运营面临诸多挑战，企业应该秉承怎样的理念才能算是与国际接轨，标杆企业有什么特点，需要怎样的领导力才能有效促进管理的提升，运营管理的趋势是什么。尽管企业行业不同、公司大小各异，但运营管理的理念和方法是相通的，...
items.body_en:
Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), discusses: in a globalized environment, companies face many operational challenges. What philosophy should a company embrace to be considered internationally aligned? What traits do benchmark companies share? What kind of leadership effectively drives management improvement, and what are the trends in operations management? Though industries and company sizes vary widely, the philosophy and methods of operations management are universal — Mr. Pei hopes this lecture will offer useful insights for the operations and growth of each attendee's own company.

Competitive Capability International (CCI) is a multinational operations management consulting firm founded in 1987, headquartered in Irvine, California, with seven offices across the globe serving primarily large corporate groups and multinational companies. CCI created its proprietary 'TRACC' Continuous Improvement System, distilling modern management tools and best practices from Fortune 500 operations, helping companies optimize their entire operational value chain and build their own world-class operating model to achieve sustainable performance results. The TRACC system represents the direction modern enterprise operations management philosophy and management systems are heading.

Speaker Qinghua Pei: Master's in Engineering, MBA. With 14 years of experience in corporate management consulting, he served as China General Manager of CCI, providing world-class operations management consulting to multinational companies such as Coca-Cola, Heinz, DuPont, and AkzoNobel, as well as major Chinese state-owned enterprises such as China Resources and COFCO. He now oversees cross-regional coordination for consulting projects in the US. He also has a strong technical background, having spent many years working on spacecraft systems design at the China Academy of Space Technology, and has two years of study and work experience in Europe, giving him unique insight into corporate operations and change management across different cultural contexts.

Friday, May 15th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, May 16th, 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833,,4696970869# US
items.body_zh:
CCI竞能咨询国际原中国区总经理裴庆华与大家探讨：在全球化背景下企业运营面临诸多挑战，企业应该秉承怎样的理念才能算是与国际接轨，标杆企业有什么特点，需要怎样的领导力才能有效促进管理的提升，运营管理的趋势是什么。尽管企业行业不同、公司大小各异，但运营管理的理念和方法是相通的，裴先生希望通过本讲座能给各自公司的运营管理和发展带来借鉴。

竞能咨询国际(CCI)是一家企业运营管理咨询的跨国公司，1987年成立，总部设在美国加州尔湾，在全球各大洲共有7家分公司，主要服务大型的集团企业、跨国公司。CCI独创名为TRACC的“持续改进系统”，汇总现代管理工具方法和500强企业运营管理的最佳实践经验，帮助企业优化整个运营价值链，打造自己的卓越运营或世界级运营模式，达成可持续的绩效成果。TRACC系统代表了现代企业运营管理的理念和管理系统的发展趋势。

主将嘉宾裴庆华:工程硕士，MBA。从事企业管理咨询14年，曾担任CCI竞能咨询国际中国区总经理, 为许多跨国企业如可口可乐、亨氏、杜邦、阿克苏诺贝尔，和国内的央企如华润、中粮等提供世界级运营管理咨询服务，现在美国负责咨询项目跨区域协同工作。他还有很强的技术背景，曾在中国空间技术研究院从事空间飞行器总体设计多年，并在欧洲有两年的学习和工作经历，对不同的文化背景下企业的运作、企业的变革管理有独到的体会。

美西时间周五5月15日8pm-9:30pm，（北京时间周六5月16日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,,4696970869# US
